title: The nativity, as retold by a private school production
content: The nativity, as retold by a private school production 13th December 2025 By Hugo Ignatius Throckmorton, aged nine TO begin with, I should have been Joseph. But my father’s endowment is apparently less deserving than Barnaby Haversham-Finch’s grandfather donating the full cost of the new stables. Anyway. Mary, a young woman played by Piers, was visited by the Angel Gabriel who told her she would shortly give birth to the Son of God. Joseph, her husband, was a mere carpenter so there was no question of putting the child’s name down for Eton. There was also no-one at home to help, for which I pitied them because Magdelena at home is an absolute godsend and has taught me elementary Polish. Caesar Augustus was conducting a census, which Daddy explained is like an audit, except checking where everyone was born and not who has undisclosed bank accounts in the Caymans like Uncle Rupert. Joseph and Mary travelled to Bethlehem, which despite not being nearly as far as the Maldives they made quite the meal of. There was no room at the inn which the innkeeper was rather smug about, bringing to mind the headteacher’s assembly about not being allowed into the Royal Enclosure at Ascot. Therefore, Jesus was born in a stable and laid in a manger. This gave him working-class credibility for the rest of his life, like the Young British Artists. It was simple accommodation without even an Aga. I personally was reminded of Tuscany. Shepherds in nearby fields were told of his birth by angels and...

title: نایب‌قهرمانی استقلال جویبار در لیگ برتر کشتی
We ask you: Where are you hiding your secret cannabis farm?
content: We ask you: Where are you hiding your secret cannabis farm? 13th December 2025 THE managers of a £3.5m cannabis farm in rural Wales have been busted for being indiscreet. Where have you set up yours so the police will never suspect? Lucy Parry, student: “There’s an old applewood wardrobe upstairs in this house I inherited which leads to a magical fairytale land. Got rid of their endless winter and they’re happily farming weed in return. A season there takes 45 minutes here. I’m coining it in.” Denys Finch Hatton, groundskeeper: “You need a large property nobody would dare check with no intruders, an oblivious tenant and a secure electricity supply. I’ve set up in the Royal Lodge, Windsor.” Norman Steele, agricultural scientist: “Right next to my coca leaf farm and opium poppy farm. That way the police will be distracted.” Helen Archer, estates manager: “Hidden in a cellar only accessible behind a revolving bookcase, and I’ve spread rumours about the terrifying Reefer Reaper to keep strangers away. Aw bollocks, the Scooby gang’s van’s broken down just outside.” Thomas Booker, comms manager: “F**k. I knew I’d forgotten something. Where did I put the bastard? It was somewhere really clever.” Family better than you because they've got an urban otter 12th December 2025

title: إجراء 229 عملية في مخيم العيون بالحديدة
Ramiz Mehdiyevə yaxın olan bu rektorlar da
content: Azərbaycan ictimai-siyasi diskursunda Ramiz Mehdiyevin adı gündəmdə qalmağa davam edir. Son günlər Prezident Administrasiyasının sabiq rəhbərinə yaxın olmuş vəzifəli şəxslərin statusu ilə bağlı ciddi dəyişikliklərdən danışılır. Bu dəyişikliklər içərisində universitet rektorlarının vəzifədən azad olunması barədə xəbərlər də xüsusi diqqət çəkir. İki gün öncə Şahin Əliyevin Ədliyyə Akademiyasının rektoru vəzifəsindən azad edilməsi akademik Ramiz Mehdiyevə yaxın olmuş universitet rəhbərlərinin məsələsinin gündəmdən çıxmadığını təsdiqlədi. Rektor postu ilə vidalaşmalı olan Şahin Əliyev bu vəzifəyə gəlməzdən öncə uzun illər Prezident Administrasiyasında şöbə müdiri işləyib. Şahin Əliyev siyasi çevrələrdə Prezident Administrasiyasının sabiq rəhbəri Ramiz Mehdiyevə yaxın kadrlardan biri kimi tanınıb. Elə onun Adminsitrasiyadakı vəzifəsini itirəndən sonra rektor postuna aparılmasının da Ramiz Mehdiyevin sayəsində baş tutduğu söylənilir. Ramiz Mehdiyev uzun illər Azərbaycan siyasi sistemində “boz kardinal” kimi tanınmışdı - Prezident Administrasiyasının rəhbəri kimi mərkəzi hakimiyyət aparatında əsas oyunçulardan biri olmuşdu. 1995–2019-cu illərdə bu postda fəaliyyət göstərərkən bir çox mühüm qərarların verilməsinə təsir göstərmişdi. Akademik Mehdiyevin uzun illər ərzində formalaşdırdığı şəbəkənin universitetlərdə müxtəlif səviyyələrdə təmsil olunduğu qeyd edilir: bu sırada rektorlar, prorektorlar, dekanlar, kafedra müdirlərinin az...

title: Məzahir Pənahov vəzifədən
content: Mərkəz Seçki Komissiyasının (MSK) hazırkı tərkibinin səlahiyyət müddəti gələn il başa çatır. Qurumun üzvləri sonuncu dəfə 2021-ci ilin aprel ayının 27-də formalaşıb. Modern.az-ın məlumatına görə, MSK sədri Məzahir Pənahov bu il Komissiyanın tərkibinin yenidən formalaşdırılacağı barədə iddialara münasibət bildirib. O, açıqlamasında deyib ki, MSK-nın bu il yenidən formalaşdırılması nəzərdə tutulmur. Qeyd edək ki, mövcud qanunvericiliyə görə, MSK-nın səlahiyyət müddəti 5 ildir. Yəni ən geci gələn ilin aprelində qurumun hazırkı tərkibinin işinə son veriləcək. Hazırda MSK-ya Məzahir Pənahov sədrlik edir. O, gələn ilin mart ayında 75 yaşını tamamlayacaq. 25 ildir MSK-ya rəhbərlik edən Pənahov son dövlərdə mediada daha çox ailə problemləri ilə gündəmə gəlib. Belə ki, Məzahir Pənahovun oğlu Məhəmməd Pənahovla keçmiş həyat yoldaşı arasındakı qalmaqal yaşanıb. Onun həyat yoldaşına şiddət göstərdiyi iddia edilir. Hazırda tərəflər arasında məhkəmə çəkişməsi davam edir. Ən geci gələn ilin aprelində Milli Məclisdə MSK-nın tərkibi yenidən formalaşacaq. Komissiyanın 6 üzvü deputatları Milli Məclisdə çoxluq təşkil edən və onların namizədliklərini təqdim edən siyasi partiyanı, 6 üzvü heç bir siyasi partiyaya mənsub olmayan (müstəqil) və onların namizədliklərini təqdim edən deputatları, 6 üzvü deputatları Milli Məclisdə azlıq təşkil edən və onların namizədliklərini təqdim edən siyasi partiyaları təmsil edir. Məzahir Pənahovun yeni tərkibdə olmayacağı...

title: Bu kolbasalarla bağlı əhalinin
content: Gündəlik qəbul üçün ən arzuolunmaz qida kolbasadır. Medianews.az Medicina.az-a istinadən xəbər verir ki, qastroenteroloq Yevgeniya Melnikova kolbasa kimi məhsulların həddindən artıq qəbulunun dağıdıcı nəticələrini izah edib. Həkimin sözlərinə görə, emal olunmuş ət sağlam məhsul hesab edilə bilməz, çünki tərkibində çoxlu dad gücləndiriciləri, duz, doymuş yağlar və nitratlar var. Melnikova həmçinin onun yüksək kalorili məhsul olduğunu vurğulayıb. "Müntəzəm istehlak üçün ən arzuolunmaz olanlar, 100 qramda 200-600 kilokalori olan yağlı ətlərdir, məsələn, qurudulmuş kolbasa", - deyə o bildirib. Melnikova xəbərdarlıq edib ki, kolbasa sevənlər piylənmə və nəticədə özlərində 2-ci tip diabet riskini artırırlar. Bu məhsullarda həddindən artıq duz lipid metabolizmasını pozur və bu da zamanla hipertoniya və aterosklerozun inkişafına səbəb olur. Kolbasanın digər təhlükəli nəticələrinə osteoporoz, kalsium və fosfor metabolizma pozulması və kolorektal xərçəng daxildir.

title: NFL playoff picture: Updated projections, chances to make the postseason
content: We're officially through Week 14 of the 2025 NFL season and into Week 15, and the playoff picture and the road to Super Bowl LX are starting to come into view. Which teams have the best chances to make the 14-team field? Which still have work to do to ultimately get in? No one has clinched yet ... but a few teams are getting close. We used ESPN's Football Power Index to project the rest of the season, looking at the playoff picture for both conferences. We included updated odds for every team to make the postseason , clinch its division and even make the Super Bowl. And we also have projected seeds. Here's everything you need right now. Last update: Dec. 12 at 7 a.m. ET Jump to: AFC picture | NFC picture AFC seeds | NFC seeds Projecting the AFC playoff field The Chiefs are out of contention for the AFC West title for the first time in 10 seasons. In order to earn a playoff berth, they'll have to be a wild-card team, which ESPN's FPI currently gives them only an 11% chance of becoming. Meanwhile, the Jaguars took control of the AFC South from the Colts (who were dealt a major blow with Daniel Jones ' Achilles tear ) in Week 14. In Week 15, the Patriots can clinch the AFC East with a win -- and clinch at least the playoffs with losses from the Texans and Colts. The Broncos can clinch a playoff berth with a win or losses from the Texans, Colts and Jaguars. The Browns and Jets joined the Raiders and Titans in being eliminated from playoff contention last week. Projecting the NFC...

title: Why some NBA teams might avoid a Giannis or AD trade: 'Cost of a mistake is too high'
content: In June 2023, the Suns acquired Bradley Beal from the Washington Wizards , a deal that came on the heels of Phoenix landing Kevin Durant from the Brooklyn Nets before that year's trade deadline. After the moves, new owner Mat Ishbia hailed the creation of the NBA's next superteam. Three months later , the Milwaukee Bucks swapped Jrue Holiday for Damian Lillard to add a superstar sidekick for Giannis Antetokounmpo in his chase for a second title. The move impacted the title race, but for the Boston Celtics , who wound up with not just Holiday, but also Kristaps Porzingis as they constructed an elite roster that claimed the franchise's 18th championship. Those trades rattled the NBA landscape. The league is in a far different place two years later. "The new [ Collective Bargaining Agreement ] caused a market correction," an Eastern Conference executive told ESPN. "Teams had to wise up." Trade season kicks into gear Monday , when most of the league's players become eligible to be moved. As teams take a closer look at their rosters and as trade buzz builds around Antetokounmpo and Anthony Davis , our weekly trip around the Association examines the changing concept of superstar value, why teams are now thinking twice about taking on gigantic deals and what it could mean for the lead-up to the Feb. 5 deadline. Why is the value of star players changing? Brian Windhorst: For many years, when teams chased star players via free agency or trade, the more years they had on their...

title: Don't be surprised if ... Brock Purdy, Chase Brown are league winners down the stretch
content: Each week in the NFL is its own story -- full of surprises, both positive and negative -- and fantasy football managers must decide what to believe and what not to believe moving forward. Perhaps we can help. If any of these thoughts come true ... don't be surprised! NOTE: All mention of fantasy points is for PPR formats, unless otherwise mentioned. Don't be surprised if ... San Francisco 49ers QB Brock Purdy is a top-10 fantasy QB this month Matchups matter, and Purdy and his buddies play the Tennessee Titans this week, then the reeling Indianapolis Colts . That should be enough to persuade fantasy managers to slide Purdy into their lineups. The Titans are bad, and they have been lit up recently by Shedeur Sanders , Davis Mills and others. There's more. The 49ers didn't play in Week 14. While we/many mocked the NFL for having teams serve bye weeks in December, during our fantasy playoffs! (how dare they!), the aftermath of this is important. RB Christian McCaffrey and TE George Kittle rested. Of course, they are the lone 49ers typically in a fantasy lineup. Purdy rested, too. He lacks the flashy statistics this season as he battled a sprained left shoulder and then a toe injury, missing more than half the games. Purdy threw three touchdown passes in Week 11 against Arizona, then threw three interceptions the following Monday night against the tougher-than-people-realize Carolina Panthers . He scored 17.12 points in Week 13 against a strong Cleveland Browns defense. Purdy...

title: Homem é preso suspeito de se passar por psiquiatra em clínicas do DF e GO
content: Um homem foi preso pela Polícia Civil de Goiás na manhã de hoje suspeito de se passar por psiquiatra em clínicas do Distrito Federal e de Valparaíso (GO). Ele teria usado a identidade profissional de um médico do estado de São Paulo. A prisão preventiva foi cumprida durante a Operação Mentis Dolus. O que aconteceu O homem, identificado como Diogo Luiz de Silva Lima, usou meios digitais para assumir a identidade profissional de outro médico, informou a Polícia Civil. Segundo as investigações, o suspeito acessou ilegalmente a conta gov.br da vítima para obter dados sensíveis e solicitar registros em conselhos regionais de medicina fora de São Paulo, incluindo no DF. Com os documentos falsificados, o suspeito conseguiu se infiltrar em clínicas, onde atendeu pacientes, prescreveu medicamentos controlados e emitiu laudos psiquiátricos, sem qualquer formação na área. A polícia afirma que a atuação foi sistemática e estruturada, colocando em risco a saúde de pacientes e causando prejuízos às clínicas. Segundo a Polícia Civil, durante o período em que atuava de forma fraudulenta, o investigado chegou a alterar oficialmente o próprio registro civil, passando a se identificar como Daniela Luiza da Silva Lima Cavalcante . A mudança de nome, de acordo com os investigadores, teria sido usada como estratégia para dificultar a identificação, ocultar antecedentes e permitir a continuidade das atividades criminosas em diferentes estados e áreas da...
creator: Natália Veloso

Milli Savunma Bakanlığı Paylaştı!
content: Yuva yaptılar göklere, baş döndüren yerlere... Hayatlarını vatanlarına adayan kahraman askerler, yurdun geçtiği her zor dönemde varlığını hissettirerek gönüllere dokunuyor. MEHMETÇİK VATAN NÖBETİNDE Depremde, selde, her türlü zorlukta kahraman askerlerimiz vatandaşının yanında yer almaya devam ediyor. Mehmetçik, vatan sınırının her köşesinde teröristlere göz açtırmadan operasyonlarını sürdürüyor. 'TERÖRSÜZ TÜRKİYE' Öyle ki türlü olumsuzluklara rağmen vatan savunmasından bir an olsun vazgeçmeyen askerlerimiz vatan savunmasını sürdürüyor. Bu kapsamda ülkemizde ve sınırlarımızda terör örgütünün tasfiyesine yönelik 'Terörsüz Türkiye' süreci start aldı. MSB PAYLAŞTI Tüm bu süreç devam ederken Milli Savunma Bakanlığı'nın X hesabından dikkat çeken bir paylaşım geldi. GÖKYÜZÜNE YANSIYAN GÖRÜNTÜLER Bakanlığın paylaşımında, savaş uçaklarımızın gökyüzüne yansıyan görüntüsüne yer verildi. MSB tarafından yapılan paylaşıma, 'Gökyüzünde kusursuz uyum...' notu düşüldü. BEĞENİ YAĞMURUNA TUTULDU Bakanlık tarafından paylaşılan görsele binlerce kullanıcı tarafından beğeni ve yorum yapıldı.

title: NANO Talk: Neuer Kolonialismus – Kampf um Macht in neuen Sphären
content: Allmachtsfantasien und Weltherrschaft Mit der "Entdeckung" Amerikas begann das koloniale Zeitalter. Damals ging es hauptsächlich um Landnahme, Gold und Versklavung. Heute geht es auch um digitale Daten, seltene Erden und eine Vormachtstellung im Weltall. Die neuen Kolonialmächte sind nicht mehr nur Staaten, sondern auch Firmen wie Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Huawei und DeepSeek. Hat das Kolonialzeitalter am Ende gar nicht aufgehört zu existieren? Versklavt der moderne Kolonialismus per Glasfaser uns alle? Geht es am Ende wieder um globale Allmachtsfantasien und Weltherrschaft? Darüber diskutiert Stephanie Rohde mit ihren Gästen.
creator: 3sat

Brazilian Storm no kitesurfe? Campeão mundial brinca: 'Falam que sou ET'
content: O kitesurfe é um esporte que cresce bastante no Brasil, tanto que os últimos dois campeões mundiais são brasileiros. Gabriel Benetton, vencedor do circuito em 2024, vê uma geração talentosa que pode dar ainda mais alegrias para a torcida. Para ele, o crescimento do kitesurfe só estará efetivamente consolidado quando ele se tornar esporte olímpico. Atualmente, o programa dos Jogos conta com a Fórmula Kite, que é muito mais ligada à vela do que às manobras arrojadas em ondas. Quando vira olímpico o esporte decola muito, assim a gente ia conseguir crescer muito como atleta no Brasil. Eu tenho muita limitação, não só eu, mas todos os meus amigos do kitesurfe. Eu sinto que o kite ainda não tem todo o respeito que era para ter porque não é esporte olímpico. Gabriel Benetton, ao UOL Benetton vê o kitesurfe com potencial ainda maior do que o surfe nas Olimpíadas. A explicação passa pela possibilidade de manobras impressionantes e disputas até o último segundo de cada bateria. "Imagina o cara assistindo à Olimpíada e vem um cara como eu, por exemplo, e dá um 1440° com o shuffle no final com a prancha solta no pé. É uma parada que impressiona, sabe? Muita gente olha minhas manobras com a prancha solta no pé e fala não é possível, moleque é um ET que faz isso, porque choca assim, sabe? É fora da realidade. O esporte é muito visual, tem que estar lá", analisou. O campeão mundial do ano passado ainda frisou que, caso o kitesurfe se torne um...

title: Abraço, gol e elogio de Guardiola: Rodrygo faz derrota virar recomeço
content: A derrota para o Manchester City, por 2 a 1, colocou o Real Madrid na maior crise dos últimos anos. O técnico Xabi Alonso é questionado, o time não consegue render, Vini Jr. vive seu maior jejum de gols em quatro anos, e Kylian Mbappé não pôde jogar por problemas físicos. Só um jogador saiu melhor do que entrou na desastrosa noite de quarta-feira no Santiago Bernabéu: Rodrygo. O brasileiro quebrou um jejum de mais de 9 meses sem marcar gols com o time merengue, deu um abraço carregado de simbologia no treinador e, após a partida, foi procurado por Pep Guardiola. O técnico do City, um dos maiores da história, queria elogiá-lo. "Fui falar pra ele o quanto ele é bom. É um jogador de outro nível. Fico feliz que ele tenha voltado, é muito bom jogador", afirmou o treinador catalão. O City foi um dos clubes que tentou tirar Rodrygo do Real Madrid na janela de transferências do verão europeu. Fim de uma agonia O gol que abriu o placar para o Real Madrid não serviu para dar pontos aos Blancos, mas encerrou um longo jejum. Foram 281 dias, desde 4 de março, sem balançar as redes. A última vez havia sido na vitória sobre o Atlético de Madrid, também na Champions League. Daquele jogo em diante, o brasileiro viveu de tudo um pouco: primeiro, um desgaste físico e mental intenso o afastou da reta final da temporada passada, ainda com Carlo Ancelotti como treinador. No Mundial de Clubes, já sob o comando de Xabi Alonso, Rodrygo foi deixado em segundo plano:...

title: Presidente do Inter confirma Abel Braga como diretor após evitar queda
content: O presidente do Internacional, Alessando Barcellos, confirmou nesta sexta-feira a permanência de Abel Braga no clube, no cargo de diretor técnico. Fruto do entendimento do clube da importância e do desejo do Abel também, já tinha manifestado isso em outras ocasiões. O Abel não parou de trabalhar desde domingo, tem trabalhado diariamente conosco, já na perspectiva de busca de um novo treinador. Alessandro Barcellos, presidente do Internacional O que aconteceu O contrato de Abel Braga como diretor técnico terá validade de um ano. Ele será peça-chave na montagem do novo departamento de futebol do Colorado. Durante a semana, o diretor de futebol D'Alessandro e o executivo André Mazzuco foram desligados do clube . O vice de futebol José Olavo Bisol também deixou o cargo. O Inter também segue na busca de um novo técnico. Aos 73 anos, Abel Braga deixou a aposentadoria para comandar o Inter nas duas últimas rodadas do Brasileiro, com o objetivo de salvar o clube do rebaixamento. Com a vitória contra o Bragantino na última rodada, e as derrotas de Ceará e Fortaleza, o Colorado permanece na Série A para 2026. Ele já havia confirmado que ficaria apenas até o fim do Brasileirão. Esta não será a primeira experiência de Abel como dirigente. Entre 2022 e 2023, ele exerceu o cargo de diretor técnico do Vasco.

title: الأردن إلى نصف نهائي كأس العرب
content: - الأردن إلى نصف نهائي كأس العرب بلغ المنتخب الأردني الدور قبل النهائي من بطولة كأس العرب لكرة القدم، بعد فوزه على نظيره العراقي 1-صفر، الجمعة، ضمن منافسات دور الثمانية. وسجل علي علوان، الذي انفرد بترتيب هدافي البطولة برصيد أربعة أهداف، هدف المباراة الوحيد لـ"النشامى" من ضربة جزاء في الدقيقة 41. وسيواجه منتخب الأردن في الدور قبل النهائي، نظيره السعودي الاثنين المقبل، والذي تأهل بدوره للمربع الذهبي بعد فوزه على فلسطين 1-2 أمس الخميس في دور الثمانية.

title: Winter virus season so far is not too bad, but doctors worry about suffering to come
content: By MIKE STOBBE, Associated PressNEW YORK (AP) — It may feel like you are surrounded by sniffles and coughs, but flu season activity is still low in many parts of the U.S.New government data posted Friday shows that as of last week, flu activity was high in four states — Colorado, Louisiana, New Jersey and New York — and minimal or low in most others. Severity indicators are increasing but are still within the boundaries of a “mild” season, said officials at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.A number of diseases tend to peak in the winter, thanks to indoor gatherings that help germs spread. The list includes not only colds and flu but also norovirus — a highly infectious cause of vomiting and diarrhea. Norovirus cases have generally been trending up in the last month.Here are three seasonal respiratory viruses that experts are keeping an eye on:Experts are closely watching fluLast flu season was bad, with the overall flu hospitalization rate the highest since the H1N1 flu pandemic 15 years ago. With the addition of a late-reported case, child flu deaths reached 288, the worst recorded for regular U.S. flu season and the same number seen in the 2009-2010 flu pandemic.This season’s first pediatric flu death was reported this week.There are reasons to fear this winter might be bad.One type of flu virus — called A H3N2 — historically has caused the most hospitalizations and deaths in older people. So far this season, that’s the type most frequently reported....

Severity indicators are increasing but are still within the boundaries of a “mild” season, said officials at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.A number of diseases tend to peak in the winter, thanks to indoor gatherings that help germs spread. The list includes not only colds and flu but also norovirus — a highly infectious cause of vomiting and diarrhea. Norovirus cases have generally been trending up in the last month.Here are three seasonal respiratory viruses that experts are keeping an eye on:Experts are closely watching fluLast flu season was bad, with the overall flu hospitalization rate the highest since the H1N1 flu pandemic 15 years ago. With the addition of a late-reported case, child flu deaths reached 288, the worst recorded for regular U.S. flu season and the same number seen in the 2009-2010 flu pandemic.This season’s first pediatric flu death was reported this week.There are reasons to fear this winter might be bad.One type of flu virus — called A H3N2 — historically has caused the most hospitalizations and deaths in older people. So far this season, that’s the type most frequently reported....

title: Epstein'in albümünden yeni fotoğraflar çıktı! Donald Trump, Bill Clinton, Bill Gates...
content: ABD'de, reşit olmayan kız çocuklarına yönelik fuhuş ağı oluşturduğu iddiasıyla yargılandığı sırada hapishanede ölü bulunan milyarder Jeffrey Epstein'in albümünden, Başkan Donald Trump'ın da yer aldığı yeni fotoğraflar paylaşıldı. Gözetim ve Hesap Verebilirlik Komitesinin Demokrat üyelerinin paylaştığı yeni fotoğraflarda, Trump ile birlikte, eski danışmanı Steve Bannon, eski ABD Başkanı Bill Clinton, Bill Gates ve yüksek profilli diğer bazı isimlerin yer aldığı görüldü. Epstein'in malikanesinde çekildiği belirtilen fotoğrafların, kendisine ait e-posta adresinden elde edildiği belirtildi. ABD medyasındaki haberlerde yeni paylaşılan 19 kare fotoğrafın, Epstein'in geçmişte, söz konusu kişilerle bağlantılı olduğu ve "özel ilişkiler geliştirdiğini" ortaya koyduğu değerlendirmesi yapıldı. Komitenin servis ettiği fotoğraflar arasında, üzerinde Başkan Trump'ın yüz çiziminin de yer aldığı ve 4,5 dolar fiyat etiketi bulunan prezervatifler de ABD medyası ve sosyal medyada gündem oldu. Paylaşılan diğer bir fotoğraf karesinde ise Trump, yüzleri komite tarafından sansürlenmiş altı kadınla birlikte görülüyor. Ne zaman, nerede ve kim tarafından çekildiği henüz bilinmeyen fotoğraflarda, Clinton, Epstein ve kız arkadaşı Ghislaine​​​​​​​ Maxwell ile birlikte görülürken, Prens Andrew, milyarder iş insanı Bill Gates ve eski Harvard Üniversitesi Rektörü Larry Summers gibi isimler de söz konusu malikanede çekilen...

برنامج الأغذية العالمي: أوضاع مدينة الفاشر السودانية تتجاوز 'الفظاعة'
content: وقال مدير قسم التأهب والاستجابة للطوارئ في برنامج الأغذية العالمي، روس سميث، وفي حديثه للصحافيين في جنيف، إن "انقطاعات الشبكة أدت لقطع الاتصالات إلى حد كبير، ما سمح بوصول معلومات محدودة فقط من مدينة شمال دارفور". وأشار إلى أن "صور الأقمار الصناعية وشهادات الناجين تصف المدينة بأنها مسرح جريمة، حيث تنتشر فيها عمليات القتل الجماعي والجثث المحروقة والأسواق المهجورة"، موضحاً أنه "لا توجد أي مؤشرات على إعادة فتح طرق التجارة أو وصول الإمدادات إلى المدينة"، وأن "برنامج الأغذية العالمي لم يعد لديه شركاء في المجال الإنساني على الأرض، ولا توجد تقارير مؤكدة تفيد بتشغيل مطابخ إطعام جماعية". ووصف سميث الفرار من الفاشر بأنه "شديد الخطورة"، مشيراً إلى عمليات السطو والنهب والعنف القائم على النوع الاجتماعي، والطرق المليئة بالألغام والذخائر غير المنفجرة. وأضاف أن الأشخاص الذين تمكنوا من الفرار دفعوا مبالغ باهظة مقابل النقل، ليجدوا أنفسهم في النهاية في مناطق تعاني من نقص حاد في المساعدات. اقرا ايضا.. شبكة أطباء السودان: 19 ألف محتجز بسجون الدعم السريع في دارفور ودعا برنامج الأغذية العالمي إلى ضمان الوصول غير المقيد إلى الفاشر لتقييم الاحتياجات الإنسانية. وقال سميث إن "سلطات قوات الدعم السريع وافقت مبدئياً على الحد الأدنى من شروط الأمم المتحدة للدخول"، لافتاً إلى أن "برنامج الأغذية العالمي جاهز. المواد الغذائية والشاحنات متوفرة للوصول الفوري إلى جميع السكان المدنيين إذا تم تأمين ممر آمن". وركز على منطقة تويل، حيث يعيش أكثر من 650 ألف نازح في ظروف ضيقة ومؤقتة، مع تفشي وباء الكوليرا وندرة الخدمات الأساسية. وحذر من أنه في حال عدم توفر تمويل...

title: Kurtenbach: Titans QB Cam Ward has the goods, but expect the 49ers to win anyway
content: Coming off the bye week, the San Francisco 49ers find themselves in an enviable position. They are rested, getting healthier, and eyeing not just the playoffs but potentially the NFC’s No. 1 seed.With one more win, they are a virtual lock for the tournament. And—as luck would have it—here comes a team tied for the worst record in the NFL, flying cross-country to Levi’s Stadium this Sunday.On the surface, this looks like a mismatch of epic proportions. The oddsmakers have the spread at 12.5 points, and I get it: The Titans are a team in transition with a rookie quarterback, plenty of moving parts, and an interim head coach. Meanwhile, the 49ers are a battle-tested operation on the verge of playing their 18th game.This might feel like a perfunctory victory for San Francisco, but I’m not so sure. There are layers to this matchup that suggest it could be entertaining—even if it’s difficult to see any result other than a Niners win.Here are three predictions for Sunday’s clash.Brock Purdy Will Dismantle a “Chaos Defense”The Titans are currently running what I call a “chaos defense”—a scheme modeled after the Mike Macdonald or Brian Flores style, designed to confuse quarterbacks with positionless players and exotic blitz packages.The problem? The chaos seems to be confusing the Titans more than their opponents.While the interior duo of Jeffery Simmons and T’Vondre Sweat is formidable—perhaps the best defensive tackle combination in the league—the back end of the Titans’ defense...
creator: Dieter Kurtenbach

title: Netflix Confirms Highly Anticipated Season 2 Premiere for Its Biggest Fantasy Video Game Anime Adaptation
content: A still from Netflix's Devil May Cry. With the year rounding up in a few weeks, Netflix is gearing fans up for the return of its best-rated fantasy video game anime adaptation of 2025, Devil May Cry. From prolific creator Adi Shankar and animated by South Korean Studio Mir, the hit series premiered on April 3, 2025, and became an instant favorite among viewers worldwide who have long been anticipating a return date. Well, their wishes have come true as Devil May Cry has officially announced its Season 2 premiere date months after unveiling a super-charged teaser trailer. At the 2025 Game Awards, via a press release, it was announced that Devil May Cry Season 2 will arrive on May 12, 2026, a confirmation also shared by the show's X account. The social media post also includes a still from the series featuring twin brothers Dante and Vergil, as well as their mother. The estranged brothers are portrayed by Johnny Yong Bosch and Robbie Daymond, respectively. Devil May Cry is based on the Japanese video game franchise of the same name by Capcom and centers on the demon hunter-for-hire Dante as he attempts to foil a demonic invasion of Earth headed by a sinister terrorist called the White Rabbit . At the same time, he also comes into conflict with the DARKCOM lieutenant Mary Ann Arkham , whom he nicknames"Lady." The first season of the adaptation boasts a praiseworthy 96% from critics on Rotten Tomatoes, with the consensus commending it for"honoring its source material's flair for...

title: Venezuelan dissident Machado credits Trump for advancing freedom movement, dedicates Nobel to him
content: Fox News Channel offers its audiences in-depth news reporting, along with opinion and analysis encompassing the principles of free people, free markets and diversity of thought, as an alternative to the left-of-center offerings of the news marketplace. FIRST ON FOX: Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado is crediting President Donald Trump for helping sustain Venezuela’s pro-democracy movement while dedicating her Nobel Peace Prize to him, telling Fox News Digital that he provided critical support at a moment when Venezuelans felt abandoned by the international community. 'I am absolutely grateful to President Trump for every gesture, every signal and every moment that he has stood with the Venezuelan people. I have watched it very closely, and I know what it has meant for those who are fighting to reclaim democracy and freedom in our country,' she stated. 'A free and democratic Venezuela is not only possible — it is closer than ever. And that free Venezuela is breathing louder than ever before,' Machado said, adding that her Nobel Peace Prize is also dedicated to Trump. 'This Nobel Prize is symbolic of that fight for freedom and is dedicated to the Venezuelan people and to President Trump for showing what strong leadership looks like in the moments that matter most.' title: Bill Belichick Fires 2 Coaches in Major North Carolina Shake-Up
content: After an underwhelming 4-8 season, North Carolina head coach Bill Belichick is overhauling his Tar Heels coaching staff. Most expected big changes after Bill Belichick’s dismal first season as the head coach of the North Carolian Tar Heels. The Tar Heels went 4-8 under Belichick. Their wins came against Charlotte, Richmond, Syracuse, and Stanford — not exactly a who’s who of college football. It marked the first time since 2018 the school didn’t qualify for a bowl game. UNC also had three losses in one score games — Cal , Virginia , and Duke — and he could just as easily finished 7-5 with some optimist toward 2026 instead of staring down the barrel of a massive coaching reshuffle. More News: Bryce Underwood-LSU Rumors Take Dramatic Turn Head coach Bill Belichick of the North Carolina Tar Heels smiles during warmups prior to their game against the Duke Blue Devils at Kenan Memorial Stadium on November 22, 2025 in Chapel Hill, North Carolina. More News: Michigan Has Interest in NFL Coach to Replace Sherrone Moore: Report Those big changes started on Friday morning when two key pieces of Belichick’s inaugural UNC staff were fired, according to ESPN’s Pete Thamel. “UNC has fired STC Mike Priefer, per ESPN sources,” Thamel wrote. “And sources also confirm the firing of OC Freddie Kitchens.” Kitchens was a holdover from Mack Brown’s staff the previous year. title: If Only One Reacher Character Returns In Season 4, Let It Be This Guy
content: Alan Ritchson looks irked as Reacher Reacher will soon return to Prime Video with another case for Alan Ritchson to solve, but he won't be alone. Given her continued presence throughout the series so far, Maria Sten's Neagley has a decent chance of appearing in Reacher season 4, while new cast additions include Sydelle Noel's Tamara Green, who will be joining Reacher as a co-investigator for the upcoming run. That isn't necessarily where Reacher's list of allies will end. Back in Jack's second season, we saw Malcolm Goodwin return as Oscar Finlay, lending his expertise to a crucial interrogation. And as the seasons pass in Prime Video's series, Reacher's friendship circle grows ever larger. At the time of writing, there has been no confirmation as to whether Reacher will include cameos in season 4. If only one familiar face can return, however, it needs to be this one. Please, Reacher, Bring David O'Donnell Back In Season 4 Each surviving member of Reacher's 110th Special Investigators served a distinct purpose back in season 2. Dixon was the old flame who could rekindle Reacher's cold heart, while Neagley was the more sisterly figure who could talk to Reacher on a deeper level. David O'Donnell, however, was the grounded, human presence in a landscape dominated by superheroes. Every Reacher season needs a figure of that ilk, and the role in season 3 was ably performed by Villanueva. Nevertheless, O'Donnell offers something different. title: Willson Contreras Emerges as Intriguing Cardinals Trade Piece
content: Speculation arises about a potential trade involving St. Louis Cardinals player Willson Contreras, with the Boston Red Sox reportedly showing interest. Despite Contreras's previous openness to staying, the possibility of a trade has gained traction, especially with his flexibility to play first base. The Cardinals' management is open to deals that make sense, and Contreras has a no-trade clause. The St. Louis Cardinals have a slugger at their disposal who could be a very intriguing trade piece, if the right deal comes along. There was a time early in the offseason when it didn't seem likely at all that Willson Contreras would be traded. Other veteran trade chips on the roster, like Nolan Arenado, Brendan Donovan, and JoJo Romero, all seemed far more likely to be moved. While that may still be the case, things have thawed around Contreras a tad, at least.reported that Contreras had grown more open to the idea of a trade than he had. Contreras has a full no-trade clause and has publicly spoken about his intent to stick around with the organization. title: PS Plus Loses One of Its Biggest Games Next Week
content: PlayStation Plus takes a big hit next week as one of the biggest games is leaving the subscription's game catalog. PlayStation Plus has emerged as one of the best components of Sony’s lineup. It rivals Xbox Game Pass, providing a rotating selection of monthly games as well as additional games players can enjoy as part of the subscription. But as new games are added, some titles leave the game catalog, and this is the unfortunate case, as next week, one of the biggest games on PS Plus is leaving. This collection includes some of the most influential open-world games ever made. For players who haven’t yet jumped into some of the defining crime adventures in gaming history, the clock is now ticking.One of PS Plus’ biggest bundles is leaving next week, and once it’s gone, subscribers will lose easy access to three era-defining classics.GTA: San Andreas . The bundle has been one of the most recognizable and frequently downloaded titles in the service since its arrival, offering subscribers a chance to replay three groundbreaking open-world games in one package.had a notoriously rocky launch, numerous patches and improvements have made the collection far more stable and enjoyable. Thousands of players still dive into these classics monthly, exploring the neon-soaked 1980s excess of Its removal means subscribers who haven’t finished the trilogy, or haven’t even started, now have just days left. Once it leaves PS Plus, players will only retain access if they’ve purchased the...

title: New York may lose $73M in federal highway funds over flawed immigrant commercial driver's licenses
content: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy says New York routinely issues licenses to immigrants that may be valid long after they're legally authorized to be in the country and he threatened to withhold $73 million in highway funds unless the system is fixed. title: Assam Cricket Association suspends 4 players for corruption: Details here
content: The Assam Cricket Association (ACA) has suspended four players—Amit Sinha, Ishan Ahmed, Aman Tripathi, and Abhishek Thakuri—for alleged corrupt practices during the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2025. The ACA has also filed an FIR with the state's crime branch against these players, as per PTI. They are accused of influencing and trying to instigate some current Assam team members who participated in the tournament held in Lucknow from November 26 to December 8. Following the allegations, the BCCI's Anti-Corruption and Security Unit (ACSU) conducted an inquiry. The ACA has also launched criminal proceedings against the four players for their alleged involvement in serious misconduct that threatens the integrity of cricket. Prima facie, there appears to be their involvement in serious misconduct, affecting the integrity of the sport, ACA secretary Sanatan Das The suspended players are barred from participating in any state-level tournaments or matches organized by the ACA, its district units, or affiliated clubs. They are also banned from engaging in any cricket-related activity during their suspension period. This includes officiating as match referees, coaches, umpires among others. They have been suspended to curtail any scope of further deterioration of the situation, Das said. The ACA has directed all district associations to ensure strict compliance with this order and inform clubs and cricket academies under their jurisdiction. The association has reiterated its commitment...
creator: Rajdeep Saha

title: Com futuro incerto de Jardim, Cruzeiro avalia Tite, mas relação ruim com Gabigol pode pesar
content: Às vésperas de decidir sua vida na Copa do Brasil , em semifinal contra o Corinthians , o Cruzeiro avalia nos bastidores o futuro de seu comando técnico para 2026. O futuro de Leonardo Jardim é incerto , e Tite foi oferecido ao clube para assumir o time na próxima temporada, segundo apurou a ESPN . O contrato do português com o clube celeste é válido até o final de 2026, mas seu futuro é tema de discussões diárias no Cruzeiro. Jardim participa do planejamento para o próximo ano, mas sempre que abordou o tema em entrevistas, nunca cravou a permanência. A tendência, segundo soube a reportagem, é de saída, por “motivos pessoais”. Nos bastidores, Pedro Lourenço, dono da SAF do Cruzeiro, promete investimento forte para o próximo ano em uma tentativa de convencer Jardim a permanecer. Mas, por outro lado, segundo apurou a ESPN , partes têm relação amistosa e, em caso de decisão de saída, a direção não dificultaria a vida do português, apesar da multa contratual. Em meio a esse contexto, o nome de Tite, recuperado dos problemas de saúde mental e física que o afastaram do futebol em 2025, ganha força nos bastidores. O técnico até prioriza um trabalho em um clube da Europa, mas não descarta assumir um projeto no Brasil. Segundo soube a reportagem, Tite foi oferecido ao Cruzeiro, mas há uma questão importante que envolve o treinador: a relação ruim com Gabigol , que chegou a criticar abertamente a forma como foi tratado pelo comandante no Flamengo...
creator: Daniel Bocatto

title: Premier League: Presenting key details of leaders Arsenal's injury list
content: Ahead of Arsenal's upcoming Premier League clash against Wolves on Saturday night, manager Mikel Arteta provided an update on the fitness of key players Declan Rice, William Saliba, Jurrien Timber, and Leandro Trossard. The Gunners are looking to bounce back from their recent defeat against Aston Villa. Arteta said the return dates for these players are a matter of days. Here are the details and latest updates. As mentioned, Arteta said the return dates for these players are a matter of days, with Rice likely being the closest to returning. Let's see how he [Rice] is today. Obviously he was ill. So normally in a few days it gets resolved, but we have to wait and see how far he can push, he said at a press conference. The manager hinted that Saliba could be fit for next Saturday's trip to Everton but remains a doubt against Wolves. On Timber, who missed the Champions League clash against Club Brugge due to a knock, could miss action against Wolves. Arteta said: Again, it depends how he feels today. He wasn't feeling comfortable. Again, I think it's a matter of days but whether it's tomorrow or not we will see. The update on Trossard was similar with Arteta saying: Another one that is a matter of days! Sounds boring but it's the reality. So we don't know if he is available for how long. Arteta suggested Saliba will be back in time for his side's clash against Everton next Saturday. However, he remains a doubt for the Wolves match. We have to wait and see, Arteta said....
creator: Rajdeep Saha

title: Filipe Luís vê PSG como 'quadro mais bonito do futebol' e vê formato da Intercontinental injusto ao Flamengo
content: Antes mesmo de enfrentar o Pyramids , pela semifinal da Copa Intercontinental , é quase que inevitável nas coletivas de imprensa do Flamengo o assunto Paris Saint-Germain , que já está na decisão do torneio. O time francês, que na última temporada conquistou simplesmente todos os títulos que disputou, e levantou sua primeira Champions League com direito a uma vitória por 5 a 0 para cima da Inter de Milão . Relacionado Filipe Luís lembra Flamengo x Bayern e ironiza 'massacre' de críticos: 'Deixamos boa impressão para o mundo, mas no Brasil...' ESPN.com.br Escalação do Flamengo: Filipe Luís admite mudanças e abre chance para Pedro atuar contra Pyramids ESPN.com.br Gerson pode voltar? Sosa a caminho? Fred? O termômetro das especulações do Flamengo no mercado Bruno Andrade e Felipe Silva Para Filipe Luís, o mérito maior pelos resultados é do técnico Luis Enrique, que causou uma grande revolução quando chegou, se desfazendo de Neymar , Lionel Messi e também "liberando" Kylian Mbappé para assinar com o Real Madrid . "(Luis) assinou o quadro mais bonito do futebol, que é esse PSG autoral dele. O PSG é único no futebol, é muito difícil de se copiar pelas particularidades, só dá para admirar." Questionado sobre a justiça de os outros times da Intercontinental precisarem disputar outros jogos antes, enquanto o europeu só faz a final, o técnico do Flamengo não ficou em cima do muro. "Justo não é, mas não vou ser eu a reclamar dessa oportunidade...

title: Rolf Becker: Schauspieler mit 90 Jahren verstorben
content: Der Schauspieler Rolf Becker ist tot. Der Vater von Ben und Meret Becker ist im Alter von 90 Jahren gestorben.Der ursprünglich aus Leipzig stammende Wahlhamburger Rolf Becker (1935-2025) ist verstorben. Das hat Sieghard Wilm, Pastor der Kirche St. Pauli, dem Norddeutschen Rundfunk bestätigt. Der bekannte Schauspieler ist demnach am 12. Dezember in einem Hospiz gestorben. Becker wurde 90 Jahre alt.Von "In aller Freundschaft" bis zum "Tatort"Becker war ein vielseitiger Schauspieler sowie Hörspiel- und Synchronsprecher - und wirkte im Laufe der Jahrzehnte an zahlreichen unterschiedlichen Produktionen mit. In Film und Fernsehen machte er sich erstmals in den 1960er-Jahren einen Namen und spielte später etwa unter Volker Schlöndorff (86). Den meisten Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern dürfte Becker auch als Otto Stein aus unzähligen Folgen der Fernsehserie "In aller Freundschaft" bekannt sein. Daneben war er etwa im "Tatort", bei "Der Alte", im "Polizeiruf 110", im "Großstadtrevier", in "Der Bulle von Tölz" und in vielen anderen bekannten Produktionen zu sehen.Insbesondere "seine ruhige, sympathische, klare Vehemenz und Freundlichkeit im Spiel" werden dem NDR zufolge in Erinnerung bleiben. Becker hinterlässt fünf Kinder, darunter die ebenfalls aus dem Schauspiel bekannten Ben Becker (60) und Meret Becker (56). Diese mussten sich in diesem Jahr bereits von ihrer Mutter, der Schauspielerin Monika Hansen (1942-2025), verabschieden. "Die schönste Frau der Welt ist gegangen, sie...

title: BM Genel Kurulu'ndan İsrail'e ''Gazze'ye tam erişim'' çağrısı
content: Birleşmiş Milletler Genel Kurulu, Gazze 'deki ağır insani krizin hafifletilmesi için yeni bir adım attı. İsrail 'in insani yardım girişlerine tam izin vermesini ve BM'nin sahadaki çalışmalarını engellemeyi bırakmasını talep eden karar tasarısı, ezici çoğunlukla kabul edildi. 139 ülkenin destek verdiği tasarı, uluslararası toplumun Gazze'deki duruma yönelik artan endişesini bir kez daha ortaya koydu. GAZZE'DEKİ İNSANİ DURUM İÇİN DERİN ENDİŞE Kararda, işgal altındaki Filistin topraklarında, özellikle Gazze Şeridi'ndeki ağır insani koşullara dikkat çekilerek, durumdan "derin endişe" duyulduğu belirtildi. Ayrıca Uluslararası Adalet Divanı'nın (UAD) 2 Ekim 2025 tarihli danışma görüşü memnuniyetle karşılandı. İSRAİL'E ÇAĞRI UAD'nin görüşü doğrultusunda, İsrail'in işgal altındaki bölgelerde yaşayan sivillerin günlük temel ihtiyaçlarını karşılama yükümlülüğü olduğu hatırlatıldı. BM Genel Kurulu, İsrail'den uluslararası hukuk çerçevesinde hareket etmesini ve tüm yükümlülüklerine gecikmeden uymasını talep etti. GAZZE'YE İNSAN YARDIM AKIŞI Kararda, Gazze'ye insani yardımların girişine tam olarak izin verilmesi, BM ve ilgili kuruluşların yürüttüğü yardım operasyonlarına engel olunmaması gerektiği vurgulandı. Özellikle BM'nin Filistinli mültecilere yönelik ajansı UNRWA'nın Gazze'de kritik bir rol üstlendiği belirtilerek, İsrail'in UNRWA ve diğer uluslararası kuruluşlar tarafından sağlanan yardımları...

title: Trabzonspor Beşiktaş Hazırlıklarına Devam Ediyor
content: Trendyol Süper Lig'in 16. haftasında sahasında Beşiktaş 'ı ağırlayacak olan Trabzonspor , hazırlıklarını sürdürüyor. Bordo-mavililerde, tedavi sürecini tamamlayan Savic de takımla birlikte çalışmalara katıldı. Mehmet Ali Yılmaz Tesisleri'nde Teknik Direktör Fatih Tekke, yönetiminde yapılan çalışmanın ilk bölümünde dinamik ısınma gerçekleştirildi. 5'e 2 ile devam eden antrenman taktik çalışması ile sona erdi. Galatasaray ile oynanan maçta sakatlanan Stefan Savic de bugün yapılan antrenmanda yer aldı. Oyuncunun Beşiktaş maçı öncesi yapılacak olan antrenmanlarda kendini deneyeceği, durumunun ise maç günü netlik kazanacağı öğrenildi. Bordo-mavililer, yarın saat 15.00'te yapacağı antrenmanla Beşiktaş maçı hazırlıklarını sürdürecek. - TRABZON
creator: i̇ha

title: Aydın'da 500 kg Sahte Zeytinyağı Ele Geçirildi
content: Aydın 'dan Malatya 'ya gönderilen bir araç içerisinde jandarma ekipleri tarafından 500 kilogram sahte zeytinyağı ele geçirildi. Aydın İl Jandarma Komutanlığı, Köşk İlçe Jandarma Komutanlığı ekipleri, Aydın' dan Malatya'ya sevk edilmek üzere yola çıkan bir aracı durdurarak yaptığı kontrolde, 500 kilogram sahte olduğu değerlendirilen zeytinyağı ele geçirdi. Yaklaşık 250 bin TL değerindeki ürünle ilgili gerekli idari işlemler başlatıldı. - AYDIN

title: Mumbai Police issues traffic advisory ahead of Lionel Messi`s visit on Dec 14
content: Mumbai Police on Friday issued a detailed traffic advisory ahead of the Lionel Messi`s GOAT India Tour 2025 event scheduled on December 14, 2025 at the Wankhede Stadium and Brabourne Stadium.The Argentine football icon Lionel Messi is coming to India. The tour will open on December 13 in Kolkata and will conclude in Delhi on December 15. His Mumbai event is scheduled at 5 pm on December 14 at Wankhede Stadium.The event is expected to draw large crowds along with a significant number of vehicles, police said.In order to maintain smooth traffic flow and avoid inconvenience to the public, Deputy Commissioner of Police (South), Traffic, Prashant Pardeshi, has announced a series of temporary changes, an official notification said.The traffic diversions and restrictions will be effective from 12:00 hrs to 23:00 hrs on December 14, it said.Parking restrictionsThere will be no parking facilities at Wankhede and Brabourne Stadiums. Spectators are advised to use public transport, including local trains and metro services.Temporary parking restrictions will be enforced on several key roads including:"C Road, "D Road, "E Road, "F Road, and "G RoadN.S. Road (both north and south bound)Veer Nariman Road, Dinshaw Vachha Road, and Jamshethji Tata RoadPay-and-park facilities will be temporarily suspended on Veer Nariman Road and Dinshaw Vachha Road.Changes in routine traffic patternsSeveral roads will be temporarily converted into one-way streets:"D Road will be one-way west to east from...

title: Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon 2 movie review: Kaiko?
content: Director: Anukalp GoswamiActors: Kapil Sharma, Tridha ChoudhuryRating: 1 starThe point of a sequel is you must, ideally, recall, if not actually care for the original, i.e. Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon (KKPK)— let alone whether it was a hit, hence fit for this theatrical revival.The latter’s unlikely. It would’ve made the then debutant lead actor, still India’s top TV stand-up comedian Kapil Sharma’s career in the movies, as a result.It’s been exactly a decade since.From my expressed memory of the film (that is its review then), Abbas-Mustan’s KKPK — sex-comedy about a filthy rich husband, with three frisky housewives — was a semi-fine guilty snigger, for a home-view, at best, if you could get past its crappy, cardboard aesthetics.My only visual memory of the movie is the three wives simultaneously waving goodbye to the same hero, from their separate balconies.There’s a shot like that in this second part too, that’s been produced by Abbas-Mustan, instead of the ’90s blockbuster duo directing it this time on.And which, I believe, has emerged from the writer-director Anukalp Goswami having cracked an idea to build a franchise around. That’s what’s got everyone, from Kapil, cast and crew excited to re-hit the floor.What’s that big idea?That there’s a Hindu boy (Kapil), in love with a Muslim girl. Neither family approves of their marriage. They could elope, I guess.But the Hindu boy converts to Islam, and that’s good enough for him to marry his Muslim girlfriend — who’s a runaway...

title: Beşiktaş'ta kriz bitiyor! Ve Sergen Yalçın "Tamam" dedi
content: Devre arası transfer dönemiyle birlikte Süper Lig'de yeniden çıkışa geçerek şampiyonluk yarışına tutunmak isteyen Beşiktaş'ta, çalışmalar tam gaz devam ediyor. Ocak ayını bir hayli hareketli geçirmeyi planlayan ve kadrosuna büyük ses getirecek takviyeler yapmak isteyen siyah beyazlı kulüpte, teknik direktör Sergen Yalçın da kararını verdi. Beşiktaş'ta uzun süredir devam eden kriz çözülüyor. Devre arasında hem savunmasını hem de hücum hattını güçlendirmek isteyen siyah beyazlılar, kaleci sorununu ise bitirmek istiyor. Son dönemde performansıyla eleştirilen Mert Günok ve eski formundan uzak olan Ersin Destanoğlu'nun takıma veda etmesi gündemde. Beşiktaş teknik direktörü Sergen Yalçın, kaleci krizini çözmek adına 1 numaraya seviye atlatacak bir ismin transfer edilmesini talep etti. Öte yandan Mert Günok ile birlikte Ersin Destanoğlu'nun olası vedası halinde Beşiktaş'ın, takımın birinci kalecisinin yanında bir de genç kaleci transferi yapması gündemde. Ara transfer dönemini rakiplerine kıyasla çok daha hareketli geçirmek isteyen Beşiktaş, stoper, bek, orta saha ve santrfor transferleriyle birlikte kaleci transferinde de yoğun bir çalışma sürdürüyor. Siyah beyazlı yönetim, bu bölge için Avrupa'nın 5 büyük liginden birçok önemli isimle temas halinde. İlerleyen günlerde ise Mert Günok ve Ersin Destanoğlu cephesinde sıcak gelişmeler yaşanabilir.
creator: www.aksam.com.tr

title: GÜLLÜ'NÜN ÖLÜMÜ CİNAYET Mİ? KAZA MI? Kızı dahil beş kişi gözaltında! İşte olayın kronolojisi...
content: Yalova Çınarcık'ta 6 katlı binanın teras katındaki evinin penceresinden düşerek hayatını kaybeden ünlü şarkıcı Güllü'nün ölümüyle ilgili soruşturma sürüyor. Güllü olayı cinayet mi, kaza mı? Görüntüler ve kanıtlar kimi işaret ediyor? Son dakika gelişmeleri, somut deliller ve gözaltına alınan isimler merak ediliyor. CNN TÜRK İstanbul Haber Koordinatörü Nihat Uludağ, Güllü soruşturmasındaki son bilgileri aktardı. CİNAYET Mİ? KAZA MI? Ünlü sanatçı Güllü'yü kasten öldürme şüphesiyle beş kişi gözaltına alındı. (Tuğyan Ülkem Gülter, Sultan Nur Ulu, Arif Ulu, araç sürücüsü, gittikleri evin sahibi) KİMLER GÖZALTINDA? Şarkıcı Güllü'nün ölümünün üzerinden aylar geçti. Cinayet mi, kaza mı? Olay henüz aydınlatılamadı ama adım adım sona yaklaşıldı. Şarkıcının kızıyla birlikte beş kişi gözaltına alındı. Nihat Uludağ, ''Sultan Nur Ulu, Tuğyan Ülkem Gülter'in de arkadaşı, ama Güllü'nün koruyup gözetlediği bir isim. Arif Ulu, Sultan Nur Ulu'nun babası. Niye önemli? Çünkü Arif Ulu'nun tanık ifadeleri var. Arif Ulu'nun bir arkadaşına “Gerekirse ben kızımı 30 dakikada yurt dışına kaçırabilirim.” dediği iddia ediliyor. Arif Ulu'nun arkadaşına şöyle dediği iddia ediliyor. Bu da ses kaydına alınmış ve savcılığa tanık ifadesi olarak girmiş: “'Güllü'yü benim kızım ve Tuğyan ikisi birlikte atmış.” Tuğyan'ın kaldığı evde bulunan bir kişi de yine gözaltına alınan kişilerden.'' dedi. SORUŞTURMADA...

title: US drops Magnitsky sanctions against top Brazilian judge
Шестеро футболистов покинули "Арсенал"
content: Все упомянутые футболисты прекратили сотрудничество по истечении контрактов. Защитник Александр Михаленко сыграл за "Арсенал" 25 матчей, полузащитник Максим Гаевой — 22 встречи (заработал 0+1 по системе гол+пас), игрок обороны Никита Власенко — 25 (1+0), полузащитник Фатхулло Олимзода — 9 (0+1), игрок центра поля Андрей Ишутин — 27 (0+2), а нападающий Дмитрий Вашкевич — 10 (0+1).

title: בגרמניה חוקרים: האם אוהדי מכבי תל אביב שרו את "שיר האונס"?
content: משטרת גרמניה הודיעה היום (שישי) כי פתחה בחקירה בעקבות חשד לשירים פוגעניים ששרו אוהדי מכבי תל אביב במהלך משחק הליגה האירופית שנערך אמש (חמישי) בשטוטגרט ובו הפסידה אלופת ישראל 4:1. כמה שוטרים דיווחו כי שמעו ביציעים קריאות שכבר מוכרות מערים אחרות, ובהן "שיר האונס" הידוע, המופנה כלפי אוהדי הפועל תל אביב, כך לפי הפרסומים. הרשויות בודקות האם בוצעו גם שירים מפלים אחרים. ההקלטות בוצעו באופן שמבטיח את קבילותן כראיות, והן נמצאות כעת בבדיקה. פרקליטות שטוטגרט בוחנת אף היא האם החומרים כוללים תוכן פלילי. המשטרה הוסיפה כי כרטיסים אישיים ששימשו את אוהדי מכבי תל אביב עשויים לסייע בזיהוי חשודים פוטנציאליים. בין גרמניה לישראל מתקיים שיתוף פעולה משפטי הדוק, המאפשר העמדה לדין חוצת-גבולות. משטרת שטוטגרט נתמכה במהלך המשחק בידי שוטרים מהמשטרה האזורית של באדן-וירטמברג ומחלקים נוספים בגרמניה. פרט לכך, נפתחה חקירה נגד אוהד מכבי תל אביב בן 21, לאחר שעל פי החשד ביצע "הצדעה במועל יד כלפי שוטרים בדרכו לאצטדיון".

Competição de comer melancia em resort termina em morte de hóspede em SP
content: Um homem de 37 anos morreu após sofrer parada cardiorrespiratória durante uma competição de comer melancia promovida pela recreação do São Pedro Thermas Resort, em São Pedro (SP), nesta quinta-feira (11). O que aconteceu O hóspede participava de uma atividade recreativa quando sofreu um mal súbito e entrou em parada cardiorrespiratória. A dinâmica realizada naquele momento era uma competição de comer melancia organizada pela equipe do resort. A prova consistia em comer a fruta rapidamente enquanto monitores acompanhavam a atividade na área da piscina. Funcionários iniciaram as manobras de reanimação ainda no espaço aquático. Guarda-vidas do resort tentaram reverter a parada cardiorrespiratória até a chegada de bombeiros e da ambulância. A vítima foi levada com vida ao hospital da cidade, onde morreu após atendimento inicial de emergência. O resort atribui o episódio a um mal súbito e não menciona engasgamento. Em nota enviada ao UOL , o estabelecimento disse que todos os procedimentos de emergência foram acionados imediatamente. O São Pedro Thermas Resort afirmou que mantém contato direto com a família e que está oferecendo suporte aos parentes do hóspede. O resort também declarou que preservará a privacidade dos envolvidos. Assim que nossa equipe tomou ciência da situação, todos os procedimentos de emergência foram imediatamente acionados, incluindo a prestação dos primeiros socorros e o chamado da ambulância para o atendimento...
creator: Maurício Businari

title: Man gets life in prison for gunning down father | Midday Report
content: Chico resident Matthew Shane Theobald, 35, was given 25 years to life in prison on Thursday, more than a month after pleading guilty to killing his father, 54-year-old Lenny Doe.A press release issued Thursday by Butte County District Attorney Mike Ramsey said life in prison was the maximum sentence for first-degree murder. The sentence was determined by Butte County Superior Court Judge Kristen Lucena.“In sentencing Theobald, Judge Lucena considered a letter from Doe’s wife and Theobald’s own admissions that he was on parole when the murder occurred, and that he shot Doe multiple times, taking time to reload the shotgun between shots,” Ramsey said in his release.An additional 10 years was added for using a shotgun in the crime.Theobald pleaded guilty to first-degree murder on Nov. 6, though the incident occurred on Sept. 22. Investigators determined that Theobald and Doe had gotten into an argument that got heated and ultimately ended in Theobald getting a shotgun from the home and chasing Doe down, shooting him twice.Related ArticlesFog persists, rain and wind expected next week | Midday ReportTransportation grants awarded to Butte County Public Health | Midday ReportHumboldt residents found guilty in double homicide | Midday ReportChico turns on last of 8 red light cameras | Midday ReportPastor pleads guilty to child molestation | Midday Report

title: Bursaspor'dan Farklı Galibiyet
content: TFF 2. Lig 15. hafta karşılaşmasında Bursaspor , sahasında ağırladığı Ankara Demirspor 'u 4-0 mağlup ederek haftayı farklı galibiyetle kapattı. Atatürk Spor Kompleksi Matlı Stadyumu'nda oynanan mücadeleyi Kaan Kara yönetti. Karşılaşmaya baskılı başlayan Bursaspor, 8. dakikada Hakkı Türker'in golüyle öne geçti. Ev sahibi ekip, 41. dakikada kazanılan penaltıyı Muhammet Demir ile gole çevirerek ilk yarıyı 2-0 önde tamamladı. Bursaspor, 49. dakikada Ertuğrul İdris Furat'ın golüyle skoru 3-0 yaptı. Maçın son bölümünde baskısını sürdüren yeşil-beyazlılar, 85. dakikada yine Ertuğrul İdris Furat'ın golüyle farkı dörde çıkardı ve karşılaşma 4-0 sona erdi. Tribünlerden büyük destek Hafta içi oynanmasına rağmen 30 bin 340 Bursasporlu taraftar tribünleri doldurdu. Yeşil-beyazlılar, 90 dakika boyunca takımlarına büyük destek vererek galibiyette önemli rol oynadı. - BURSA

كأس العرب.. يزيد أبو ليلى رجل مباراة الأردن والعراق
content: توج يزيد أبو ليلي حارس مرمى منتخب الأردن، بجائزة رجل مباراة فريقه أمام العراق التي أقيمت اليوم على ملعب المدينة التعليمية في الدور ربع النهائي من بطولة كأس العرب، والتي فاز بها فريقه بهدف دون رد. عبر مدرب المنتخب الأردني جمال السلامي عن فخره بالتأهل إلى نصف نهائي كأس العرب 2025 بعد الفوز على المنتخب العراقي بهدف دون رد في المباراة التي اقيمت أمس على ملعب المدينة التعليمية بربع نهائي كأس العرب، والتأهل لمواجهة السعودية في نصف النهائي. وأكد مدرب المنتخب الأردني بعد المباراة إن المنتخب الأردني كتب سطراً جديداً في تاريخ الكرة الأردنية، كما أن بلوغ المربع الذهبي جاء بعد مواجهة صعبة، إلا أن اللاعبين قدموا أداءً كبيراً وسيبذلون كل ما في وسعهم من أجل مواصلة المشوار والبحث عن التتويج العربي. وبخصوص إصابة اللاعب يزن النعيمات قال وتغلبه الدموع: "حزين على إصابة يرن النعيمات وانتصار اليوم فقد لذته وسعادتنا بسبب إصابة يزن، نسأل الله أن تكون إصابة خفيفة". كما شدد مدرب المنتخب الأردني على أن التحضير للمباراة القادمة أمام المنتخب السعودي سيجري بقوة وجدية، لكون المواجهة تحمل طابعاً خاصاً، مشيراً إلى أن الهدف الأهم هو الوصول إلى المباراة النهائية. واختتم حديثه بالتأكيد على أن المنتخب لا يخشى أي منافس، خاصة في ظل الدعم الجماهيري الكبير الذي يرافق النشامى.

“Las elecciones fueron un desastre y un fraude”: Gerardo Torres denuncia fraude electoral y pérdida de credibilidad
content: El vicecanciller de Política Exterior de Honduras, Gerardo Torres, emitió declaraciones contundentes sobre la falta de resultados oficiales tras las elecciones generales del pasado 30 de noviembre, señalando que la situación ya alcanza los 12 días de incertidumbre.“Cada día que pasa se pierde más credibilidad en el proceso”, afirmó Torres, criticando lo que califica como desinformación y manipulación durante el conteo electoral.Lea también: Marlon Ochoa reconoce derrota de Libre y asegura que ya no tienen interés en el proceso electoralCuestionamientos en la divulgaciónTorres cuestionó la veracidad de informes y audios relacionados con el proceso, mencionando a figuras y medios específicos.“Melgar mintió, Renato mintió, HCH mintió, ICN y los demás también. Por eso están todos trabados”, afirmó.El diplomático señaló además que, a su juicio, las elecciones fueron fraudulentas y un desastre, y denunció que el sistema electoral podría estar comprometido:“El sistema está hackeado. Se van a robar unas nuevas elecciones y después ustedes, como siempre, se van a hacer los majes. Historia cíclica de mi pobre patria”, agregó.Lea también: Partidos políticos en Honduras: ¿Cómo varían los votos tras las elecciones recientes?Responsabiliza directamente a la autoridad electoralTorres concluyó su mensaje responsabilizando indirectamente a las autoridades electorales por la falta de transparencia y la confusión generada, y cuestionando la falta de...

PF diz que orçamento secreto perdura mesmo com saída de Lira da presidência
content: A Polícia Federal afirma ter encontrado indícios de que Mariângela Fialek, conhecida como Tuca , seguiria atuando para perpetuar o esquema do orçamento secreto mesmo após a saída de Arthur Lira (PP-AL) da presidência da Câmara, no ano passado. O que aconteceu Pela primeira vez, a PF levanta suspeitas de que há uma tentativa de manter práticas do orçamento secreto na gestão de Hugo Motta (Republicanos-PB). A constatação faz parte do pedido de buscas nos endereços de Tuca apresentado pela PF e que levou à operação de hoje. O ministro Flávio Dino afirma que Tuca seguiria atuando para atender aos interesses de Arthur Lira (PP-AL). Dino, que autorizou a operação de hoje, analisou os depoimentos dos parlamentares ouvidos pela PF que apontaram que existiria um esquema de orçamento secreto a mando de Lira. Trecho da representação da PF é citado na decisão que autorizou as buscas. A PF diz ter encontrado indícios de perpetuação do esquema ao analisar a quebra de sigilo telemático de Tuca. Análise da PF não cita o nome de Motta. Ele sucedeu Lira no comando da Casa. Tuca atua como assessora especial dele em uma sala da presidência da Câmara que foi alvo de buscas. A PF afirma ter encontrado indícios de que ela seguiria centralizando o controle do pagamento de emendas parlamentares sem transparência. De maneira mais relevante, há elementos que indicam que, apesar da troca de comando na Câmara dos Deputados, a investigada manteria, ainda, importante...

title: Нова драма с делото на Портних! Кьовеши е права
content: Нов обрат по делото срещу Иван Портних, заведено от хората на Кьовеши! Европейската прокуратура не е излязла от границите на компетентността си при разследването срещу бившия кмет на Варна и правилно е внесла делото срещу него в Софийския градски съд (СГС). Това определи Върховният касационен съд (ВКС) и отказа да промени подсъдността на делото, като го изпрати в окръжния съд във Варна. Такова искане отправи преди дни съдия Петър Славчев от СГС, на когото беше разпределено делото по казуса с рибарското пристанище „Карантината". ВКС подчертава, че обвиненията на Портних и Пасев са по чл. 248а, ал.5 от НК. Става дума за престъпление, свързано с представяне на неверни сведения, за да бъдат получени пари от европейски фондове, а ал. 5 се отнася до случаите, когато такива пари вече бъдат получени, какъвто е случаят с Портних. Парите обаче са получени чак през 2019 г. и затова според ВКС, европрокуратурата е била комптентна да работи по делото.

title: Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan, Türkmenistan'daki temaslarının ardından yurda döndü
content: Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, "Uluslararası Barış ve Güven Forumu"na katılmak üzere gittiği Türkmenistan'ın başkenti Aşkabat'taki temaslarının ardından Türkiye'ye döndü. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan 'ı "TUR" uçağıyla geldiği Atatürk Havalimanı 'nda, Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı Cevdet Yılmaz , İstanbul Valisi Davut Gül, AK Parti İstanbul İl Başkanı Abdullah Özdemir ve diğer yetkililer karşıladı. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan ile eşi Emine Erdoğan, Dışişleri Bakanı Hakan Fidan, Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanı Alparslan Bayraktar, Cumhurbaşkanlığı İletişim Başkanı Burhanettin Duran, MİT Başkanı İbrahim Kalın, Cumhurbaşkanı Dış Politika ve Güvenlik Başdanışmanı Akif Çağatay Kılıç ve Türk Devletleri Teşkilatı Aksakallar Konseyi Başkanı Binali Yıldırım da İstanbul'a geldi.

title: Trump schwört Thailand und Kambodscha erneut auf Frieden ein
content: US-Präsident Donald Trump hat Thailand und Kambodscha im Grenzkonflikt erneut auf einen Frieden eingeschworen. Trump schrieb in seinem Onlinedienst Truth Social, der thailändische Regierungschef Anutin Charnvirakul und der Ministerpräsident von Kambodscha, Hun Manet, hätten ihm telefonisch ein Ende aller Feindseligkeiten ab Freitagabend zugesagt. Beide Länder seien nun bereit "zum Frieden und fortgesetzten Handel mit den Vereinigten Staaten von Amerika". Ende Oktober hatten Thailand und Kambodscha im Beisein Trumps ein "Friedensabkommen" in Malaysia unterzeichnet, nachdem Trump mit hohen Zöllen gedroht hatte. Danach warfen sich beiden Seiten jedoch neue Angriffe vor.Im Juli waren bei fünftägigen Gefechten zwischen beiden Ländern mehr als 40 Menschen getötet und 300.000 weitere vertrieben worden. Die jüngsten Kämpfe waren eine erneute Eskalation in dem seit Jahrzehnten andauernden Streit um die Grenzziehung im sogenannten Smaragd-Dreieck. Dort grenzen die thailändische Provinz Surin und die kambodschanische Provinz Oddar Meanchey sowie Laos aneinander. Der Konflikt ist die Folge einer unklaren Grenzziehung durch Kambodschas ehemalige Kolonialmacht Frankreich im Jahr 1907.

title: לואיס אנריקה משנה את ההיררכיה? "הוכיח שהוא מוכן"
content: פריז סן ז'רמן לא הצליחה לנצח באמצע השבוע בליגת האלופות, אבל ה- 0:0 בסן מאמס מול אתלטיק בילבאו לפחות שיפר את מעמדו של מאטביי סאפונוב. השוער הרוסי מילא את מקומו של לוקא שבאלייה בשנית, אחרי ששיחק גם ב-0:5 על ראן, והראה ללואיס אנריקה שיש על מי לסמוך. שבאלייה התגבר בינתיים על הפציעה בקרסול הימני שנגרמה כתוצאה מ תיקול גס ומסוכן של לאמין קמארה בהפסד למונאקו , אבל לא בטוח שיחזור מיד אל בין הקורות. לפני מסיבת העיתונאים לקראת משחק החוץ מול מץ (שבת, 20:00), בחר מאמן אלופת אירופה שאלה מעמוד הטוויץ' של פריז סן ז'רמן, שעסקה בהיררכיית השוערים." נכון, כל הכבוד!", פרגן לואיס אנריקה לרלוונטיות של השאלה. "ברור שאנחנו רוצים שכל השחקנים יהיו מוכנים, וסאפונוב הוכיח שהוא כזה. הוא חיכה לרגע שלו, והגיע אליו כשהוא נמצא בתקופה טובה מאוד. זה חשוב מאוד עבור הקבוצה". על שבאלייה אמר: "היום הוא התאמן כרגיל. במצב הזה, הצלחנו לראות שחקן נוסף שלא שיחק מאז תחילת העונה - סאפונוב. הוא הראה את הרמה שלו, ואנחנו מאוד שמחים לראות את השחקנים מוכנים כל הזמן. הוא הראה לא רק מקצועיות, אלא גם אישיות. יש לי הרבה אמון בשלושת השוערים. זה חשוב בשבילי ובשביל כל השחקנים לדעת שאתם חייבים להיות מוכנים כשההזדמנות מגיעה, וסאפונוב הראה את זה. נראה מחר מי יפתח". השוער הרוסי בן ה-26 הגיע מקרסנודאר בקיץ 2024 ורשם 17 הופעות בעונה שעברה, כגיבוי של ג'אנלואיג'י דונארומה. הרכישה של שבאלייה מחקה את דקות המשחק שלו, עד לשבת שעברה, ואולי כעת יהיה שינוי, לפחות זמני, לאור הפציעה והעובדה ששוער הרכש לא היה יציב ביכולתו עד כה.

title: Başkan Erdoğan Türkmenistan'da temaslarını tamamladı... Türkiye'ye döndü
content: Başkan Erdoğan, "Uluslararası Barış ve Güven Forumu"na katılmak üzere gittiği Türkmenistan'ın başkenti Aşkabat'taki temaslarının ardından Türkiye'ye döndü. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan'ı "TUR" uçağıyla geldiği Atatürk Havalimanı'nda, Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı Cevdet Yılmaz, İstanbul Valisi Davut Gül, AK Parti İstanbul İl Başkanı Abdullah Özdemir ve diğer yetkililer karşıladı. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan ile eşi Emine Erdoğan, Dışişleri Bakanı Hakan Fidan, Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanı Alparslan Bayraktar, Cumhurbaşkanlığı İletişim Başkanı Burhanettin Duran, MİT Başkanı İbrahim Kalın, Cumhurbaşkanı Dış Politika ve Güvenlik Başdanışmanı Akif Çağatay Kılıç ve Türk Devletleri Teşkilatı Aksakallar Konseyi Başkanı Binali Yıldırım da İstanbul'a geldi.
creator: www.aksam.com.tr

Army sergeant to face court-martial in Georgia base shooting that wounded 5
content: By RUSS BYNUM, Associated PressSAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — A U.S. Army soldier accused of shooting five people at a Georgia base in August will stand trial in a military court on charges including attempting murder, Army prosecutors said Friday.Charges against Sgt. Quornelius Radford are being referred to a general court-martial, which handles cases involving the most serious crimes under military law, the Army’s Office of Special Trial Counsel said in a news release.Officials say Radford opened fire with a personal handgun Aug. 6 on members of his supply unit at Fort Stewart in southeast Georgia, injuring four soldiers and a civilian worker before fellow soldiers were able to disarm and restrain him until military police arrived. Letter to the Editor: No blood for oil in Venezuela
content: In September, the newly named Department of War led by former Fox News personality Pete Hegseth began ordering attacks on alleged drug-smuggling boats off the coast of Venezuela. As of now, more than 80 people have been killed by the U.S. military in this unprovoked attack on South America.The Trump administration claims that they are committing acts of extrajudicial killings in order to stop “narco terrorists” they claim are smuggling drugs via boats into America, yet President Donald Trump is pardoning Honduras’ ex-president on drug crimes for bringing cocaine into the United States. The Venezuelan government, human rights groups the world over and the families of the victims of these merciless attacks are stating that the boats being bombed are fishing boats operated legally by local fishermen.Hegseth, the “secretary of war,” ordered an attack on Sept. 2, with allegations of him ordering “kill them all." The first strike blew up the boat but left behind two injured survivors. For nearly an hour two traumatized men clung to the bow of a mostly destroyed and capsized boat, waving their hands overhead for what some have interpreted to be a call for help or to call off a second strike. Regardless of the fact that they were shipwrecked persons, a second strike was then ordered to kill them all. This is a cruel violation of the Geneva Convention.Members of a congressional committee reviewed the footage of the attack in horror. Congress hasn’t approved the use of our military in...

title: Bingöl'den Guinness Rekoru İçin Burma Kadayıf
content: Bingöl Ticaret ve Sanayi Odası (BİNTSO), İstanbul Atatürk Havalimanı Millet Bahçesi Etkinlik Alanı'nda hazırlanan 12 metre uzunluğundaki burma kadayıf için Guinness Rekorlar Kitabı'na başvuru sürecini başlattı. BİNTSO'dan yapılan açıklamada, Bingöl'e özgü burma kadayıfının noter huzurunda gerçekleştirilen organizasyonda 12 metre uzunluğu ile dünyanın en uzun burma kadayıfı olarak Guinness Rekorlar Kitabı'na başvuru sürecinin başlatıldığı belirtildi. Coğrafi İşaret Tescil başvurusunun da resmi olarak başlatıldığının ve başvuru evraklarının BİNTSO Yönetim Kurulu Başkanı Kadir Çintay tarafından imzalandığı ifade edilen açıklamada, şu ifadelere yer verildi: "BİNTSO olarak, Bingöl Sosyal Yardımlaşma ve Dayanışma Dernekleri Federasyonu (BİNFED) ile İstanbul Atatürk Havalimanı Millet Bahçesi'nde düzenlenen Bingöl Tanıtım Günleri kapsamında ilimiz adına tarihi bir ana imza attık. Bingöl'e özgü burma kadayıfı, noter huzurunda gerçekleştirilen organizasyonla dünyanın en uzun burma kadayıfı olarak hazırlanmış ve Guinness Rekorlar Kitabı'na başvuru süreci resmen başlatılmıştır. Ulusal ve uluslararası görünürlüğü yüksek bir şehir olan İstanbul'da yapılan bu organizasyon, Bingöl'ün gastronomi mirasının tanıtılması, yerel ürünlerin markalaşması ve coğrafi işaretli ürün sayısının artırılması açısından büyük önem taşımaktadır." Açıklamada, BİNTSO'nun Bingöl'ün kültürel ve ekonomik değerlerini koruyarak...

title: كأس العرب .. مدرب الأردن: فرحتنا منقوصة بسبب إصابة يزن النعيمات
content: عبر مدرب المنتخب الأردني جمال السلامي عن فخره بالتأهل إلى نصف نهائي كأس العرب 2025 بعد الفوز على المنتخب العراقي بهدف دون رد في المباراة التي اقيمت أمس على ملعب المدينة التعليمية بربع نهائي كأس العرب، والتأهل لمواجهة السعودية في نصف النهائي. وأكد المدرب المغربي بعد المباراة إن المنتخب الأردني كتب سطراً جديداً في تاريخ الكرة الأردنية، كما أن بلوغ المربع الذهبي جاء بعد مواجهة صعبة، إلا أن اللاعبين قدموا أداءً كبيراً وسيبذلون كل ما في وسعهم من أجل مواصلة المشوار والبحث عن التتويج العربي. وبخصوص إصابة اللاعب يزن النعيمات قال وتغلبه الدموع: "حزين على إصابة يرن النعيمات وانتصار اليوم فقد لذته وسعادتنا بسبب إصابة يزن، نسأل الله أن تكون إصابة خفيفة". كما شدد على أن التحضير للمباراة القادمة أمام المنتخب السعودي سيجري بقوة وجدية، لكون المواجهة تحمل طابعاً خاصاً، مشيراً إلى أن الهدف الأهم هو الوصول إلى المباراة النهائية. واختتم حديثه بالتأكيد على أن المنتخب لا يخشى أي منافس، خاصة في ظل الدعم الجماهيري الكبير الذي يرافق النشامى.
creator: البوابة نيوز

content: STAT: Bursa Atatürk Spor Kompleksi Matlı HAKEMLER: Kaan Kara, Mehmet Eren Küçükkeçeci, Anıl Çiftçi BURSASPOR: Anıl Atağ - Hamza Gür, Ertuğrul Ersoy, Alperen Babacan, Barış Gök, Hakkı Türker (Dk. 86 Enes Çalışkan), Musa Çağıran (Dk. 54 Ahmet Hakan Atış), Tunahan Ergül (Dk. 74 Zeki Dursun), Ertuğrul İdris Furat, Sertaç Çam (Dk. 54 Ali Kerim Yıldız), Muhammet Demir (Dk. 74 Emir Kayacık) ANKARA DEMİRSPOR: Hüseyin Koç - Eren Tokat (Dk. 16 Taha Atay), Eren Paşahan, Eralp Aydın (Dk. 64 Ömer Talha Nergiz), İsa Halidi, Kadir Subaşı, Hasan Ege Akdoğan, Enes Albak (Dk. 64 Deniz Yaşar), Batuhan Süer, Leon Madi Eckhard Çalışkan, Atakan Dama (Dk. 78 Kerem Vapurluoğlu) GOLLER: Dk. 8 Hakkı Türker, Dk. 43 Muhammet Demir (P), Dk. 47 ve Dk. 85 Ertuğrul İdris Furat ( Bursaspor ) SARI KARTLAR: Tunahan Ergül, Musa Çağıran (Bursaspor) 2'nci Lig Kırmızı Grup'ta 15'inci hafta karşılaşmasında Bursaspor, sahasında konuk ettiği Ankara Demirspor 'u 4-0 mağlup etti. title: העצרת הכללית החליטה: על ישראל לשתף פעולה עם ארגון אונר"א
content: העצרת הכללית של האו"ם אישרה היום (שישי) החלטה הקוראת לישראל לשתף פעולה עם גופי האו"ם, ובראשם ארגון אונר"א. ההחלטה עברה ברוב של 139 מדינות שהצביעו בעד, 12 נגד ו-19 נמנעות. לראשונה מאז חידוש היחסים השבוע בטקס חתימה בבית שגריר ישראל בוושינגטון כש שר החוץ גדעון סער חתם עם עמיתו מבוליביה על ההסכם, בוליביה הצביעה לטובת ישראל ונגד ארגון אונר"א. ההצבעה באה לאחר חשיפת רוייטרס השבוע על רצונו של ממשל טראמפ להטיל סנקציות על אונר"א בשל "זיקה לטרור". שגריר ישראל באו"ם, דני דנון בתגובה להחלטה: "שום החלטה לא תשנה את עמדת ישראל. אונר"א הוא ארגון תומך טרור ועובדיו לקחו חלק בחטיפות, ברצח ובהסתרות של מחבלים. אני מברך את היוזמות של מדינות שפועלות לחשוף את חדירת הטרור לארגון הקלוקל הזה. ישראל תמשיך להגן על אזרחיה ולא תשתף פעולה עם ארגון שפועל נגדה". משרד החוץ הגיבו להחלטה ותקפו: "קריאתה של העצרת הכללית של האו"ם לישראל לשתף פעולה עם "אונר"א-חמאס" מוכיחה פעם נוספת שמדובר בגוף מעוות מוסרית". עוד הוסיפו: "כפי שהוכח במסמכים רבים ובקטעי וידאו, עובדי אונר"א השתתפו בטבח של ה־7 באוקטובר. אונר"א אפשרה לחמאס להשתמש במתקניה כמפקדות חמאס, לאחסון אמצעי לחימה, ולהסתרה והחזקה של חטופים". "במכונה הפוליטית הצינית של האו"ם נעשה הכול כדי להתעלם מהמציאות הזו", תקפו. "העצרת הכללית פנתה לבית הדין הבינלאומי לצדק, שעבר פוליטיזציה, כדי לקבל חוות דעת לשימוש פוליטי, וכעת התיאטרון הפוליטי הזה מאמץ את ה"מסקנות" האבסורדיות והצפויות מראש. ישראל מצדיעה למדינות שלא תמכו בהחלטה המבישה הזו". בית הדין הבינלאומי לצדק, הגוף המשפטי העליון של האו"ם, קבע לפני כחודשיים כי לישראל יש חובה להבטיח את סיפוק צרכיה הבסיסיים של האוכלוסייה האזרחית...
creator: עידן קוולר

title: كأس العرب.. ارنولد: فخور بأداء لاعبي العراق أمام الأردن
content: أثنى جراهام أرنولد المدير الفني لمنتخب العراق على أداء لاعبيه، في الشوط الثاني من مباراة الأردن التي أقيمت أمس على ملعب المدينة التعليمية، في الدور ربع النهائي من بطولة كأس العرب، والتي انتهت بفوز النشامى بهدف علي علوان من ركلة جزاء. وقال المدير الفني بعد المباراة: "قدمنا أداءًا حيدًا في الشوط الثاني، وضغطنا بكل قوة على الأردن من أجل العودة في المباراة وإدراك هدف التعادل، ولكن لم نسجل أي هدف من الفرص التي لاحت لنا على مدار هذا الشوط". وزاد: "إذا أردنا التأهل إلى كأس العالم علينا اللعب كما لعبنا الشوط الثاني في مباراة الأردن، قدمنا شوطًا وأشكر اللاعبين على الأداء في هذا الشوط، خلقوا العديد من الفرص ولكن لم نترجمها إلى أهداف". وأكمل: "فخور بأداء اللاعبين وكنا نستحق الوصول إلى نهائي كأس العرب، ولكن هذه كرة القدم، ولدينا كل الإمكانات التي تؤهلنا للوصول إلى كأس العالم، وسوف نتعلم من أخطاء كأس العرب ونتدارك كل شيء في مباراة التأهل لكأس العالم".
creator: البوابة نيوز
