title: Giorgetti, sull'oro di Bankitalia un effetto simbolico che era giusto definire
content: (ANSA) - ROMA, 12 DIC - Sull'oro della Banca d'Italia c'è stata una "grande polemica, grandi discussioni rispetto a un principio che noi riteniamo essere elementare: che l'oro che è posto a garanzia a della moneta appartiene di fatto al popolo italiano, naturalmente gestito dalla banca centrale". Così il ministro dell'Economia Giancarlo Giorgetti in videocollegamento con Atreju. "Credo che con con questa definizione che introduciamo, stabiliamo un principio importante. Qualcuno dirà non ha alcun effetto, invece ha un effetto simbolico fondamentale che era giusto definire", ha detto Giorgetti, confermando che l'emendamento sia in arrivo: "Credo già domani possa essere formalizzato". (ANSA).

title: [ВИДЕО] Критичарите одлучни: Ова се десетте најдобри ТВ ликови од 2025 година
content: Од херои и негативци до обични луѓе во необични ситуации, токму тие се причината зошто се заљубивме во насловите што ја одбележаа годината.Критичарите на „Колидер“ составија листа на десетте најдобри ТВ ликови од 2025 година, вклучувајќи ги и оние од блокбастер хитовите и потценетите бисери.Мет Мердок / Дердевил – „Daredevil: Born Again“Враќањето на Чарли Кокс во улогата на слеп адвокат кој, години по оригиналната приказна, се наоѓа на пресвртница поради новата закана од Вилсон Фиск, носи нова морална тензија на ликот. Кокс го задржува своето јадро, но воведува криза на идентитетот бидејќи Дердевил повторно се соочува со враќање во акција.Сајфер – „Gen V“Хејмиш Линклејтер го портретира харизматичниот и манипулативен декан кој станува главен антагонист на сезоната. Неговите сурови методи и мистериозен идентитет го водат заплетот, и покрај откривањето на поголема закана, тој останува еден од најважните ликови во втората сезона.Венди – „Alien: Earth“Хибрид од човечко и синтетичко суштество, Венди се соочува со мистериозна животна форма која ја загрозува планетата. Низ нејзината перспектива, се открива дистописки свет, а нејзиниот развој покажува дека таа често покажува повеќе човечност од нејзините човечки творци.Алекс – „Poker Face“На почетокот, Алекс изгледа како убав нов придружник на главниот лик, но постепено се открива како нејзин прв вистински противник. Пати Харисон носи интересна трансформација, иако серијата завршува пред понатамошниот развој на нивната...

title: Ahmet Çakar serbest bırakıldı
content: Futbolda bahis ve şike soruşturması kapsamında gözaltı kararı bulunan ancak geçirdiği kalp rahatsızlığı nedeni ile hastaneye kaldırılan Ahmet Çakar, tedavi sürecinden sonra ifade vermek için İstanbul Cumhuriyet Bassavcılığına gitmişti. SERBEST BIRAKILDI Çakar, ifadesinin ardından serbest bırakıldı. Çakar'a yurt dışı yasağı ve adli kontrol tedbiri uygulandı. Adliye çıkışı konuşan Çakar, "Savcılık tarafından serbest bırakıldım. "Buyrun gidin" dediler. İfadede söylediğim şeyler soruldu. "Ne olacak?" dedik, "Serbestsiniz, adli kontrol yok" dendi. Eşim de çocuklarımın yanında, ay sonunda gelecek." ifadelerini kullandı. "ŞU ANDA YAŞIYORSAM SAVCI SAYESİNDE" Hayatını savcıya borçlu olduğunu söyleyen Çakar, "Ben şu anda yaşıyorsam, ölmemişsem bunu savcı kardeşime borçluyum. Derin bir koroner daralma vardı, sinsi seyrediyordu. Belki de bir arabada ölecektim." Çakar, gözaltına alındıktan sonra sağlık kontrolüne getirildiğinde gazetecilerin "Neden gözaltına alındınız?" sorusuna "Bilmiyorum." demişti. Ardından rahatsızlanan Çakar hastaneye kaldırılmış ve anjiyo olmuştu. BAHİS SORUŞTURMASI Tutuklanma talebiyle sevk edilen isimlerden Adana Demirspor eski başkanı Murat Sancak, Galatasaraylı futbolcu Metehan Baltacı, Fenerbahçeli futbolcu Mert Hakan Yandaş, Alassane Ndao ve Ahmet Okatan'ın da aralarında bulunduğu 20 şüpheli tutuklandı. Tutuklanan isimler: 1-Emrah Çelik 2-Yunus Emre Tekoğul 3-Metehan Baltacı 4-İzzet Furkan Malak...

title: Gorčević: Mi smo ispunili svako završno mjerilo za pet poglavlja, nije novo da neke države postavljaju dodatna pitanja
content: Proces EU integracija nije samo tehnički, već i politički, poručila je ministarka evropskih poslova Maida Gorčević na odboru za evropske integracije.Ona je, nakon što je Ivan Vuković najavio da bi Crna Gora mogla zatvoriti samo tri poglavlja, kazala da je ministarstvo evropskih poslova zajedno sa svim resorima ispunilo svako završno mjerilo za pet poglavlja.-Sa naše strane ispunjenost postoji. Evropska komisija je konstatovala da smo ispunili sve obaveze, sada je samo politička volja neophodna od strane 27 država. Kao što to biva, postoje države koje su postavile neka pitanja. Ovo nije ništa novo. Neke interesuje možda malo više poljoprivreda pa postavljaju pitanje o tome, druge možda zanima prelazni period za poglavlje 13, dakle sva ta poglavlja mi smo riješili i na tehničkom i političkom nivou. Svaka država donosi odluku za sebe. Urađen je ogroman posao kada govorimo o ovih pet poglavlja, navela je ona.U međuvremenu, stigla je zvanična potvrda da je Francuska na sjednici Radne grupe Savjeta EU (COELA) blokirala zatvaranje dva poglavlja.Tako će Crna Gora najvjerovatnije do kraja godine zatvoriti tri od očekivanih pet poglavlja u pregovorima s Evropskom unijom (EU), jer su predstavnici Francuske blokirali "precrtavanje" dva — poglavlja 11 (Poljoprivreda i ruralni razvoj) i 13 (Ribarstvo).
creator: redakcija pobjede

title: Pedro Sánchez nominato Persona dell’Anno 2025 da L’Espresso
content: Pedro Sánchez, presidente del governo spagnolo, è la “Persona dell’Anno 2025” per il settimanale L’Espresso , che oggi gli dedica la copertina con un’intervista esclusiva a cura di Felice Florio. L’intervista in edicola domani Nell’intervista il presidente del governo spagnolo affronta numerosi temi: dalle relazioni tra Europa e Stati Uniti nell’era Trump all’alternativa progressista ai governi di destra, dal doppio standard applicato sulle guerre in Ucraina e a Gaza alla posizione del Comitato olimpico internazionale sulla partecipazione di Israele ai Giochi invernali, fino alla strategia economica che ha sostenuto la crescita spagnola. Parlando dell’Unione europea, Sánchez ha riferito:“Il paradosso è che più abbiamo bisogno di europeismo, più governi di stampo nazionalista e reazionario nascono. E non fanno altro che indebolire il progetto europeo”.

title: Court fixes February 26 for judgment in Abba Kyari’s asset declaration case
content: The Federal High Court in Abuja on Friday fixed February 26, 2026 for judgment in the case filed by the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency against suspended Deputy Commissioner of Police and former head of the Police Intelligence Response Team, Abba Kyari. Justice James Omotosho fixed the date after counsel for the NDLEA, Sunday Joseph, Kyari’s lawyer, Onyechi Ikpeazu (SAN), and counsel for his brothers, Monjok Agom, adopted their written addresses and presented their arguments for and against the charge. Kyari and his brothers, Mohammed Kyari and Ali Kyari, are facing a 23-count charge marked FHC/ABJ/CR/408/2022, filed by the NDLEA, in which they are listed as the first to third defendants respectively. The agency accused the Kyari brothers of failing to make full disclosure of their assets adding that they allegedly engaged in the “disguising of ownership of properties and conversion of monies.” According to the NDLEA, it uncovered 14 assets belonging to Abba Kyari, including shopping malls, a residential estate, a polo playground, land and farmland. Kyari was alleged to have failed to declare ownership of the properties located in various parts of the Federal Capital Territory and in Maiduguri, Borno State. The NDLEA further alleged that over ₦207 million and €17,598 were discovered in Kyari’s bank accounts. The agency said the alleged offences are punishable under Section 35(3)(a) of the NDLEA Act and Section 15(3)(a) of the Money Laundering (Prohibition) Act, 2011....

title: Lepra sa po desaťročiach vrátila do Rumunska: Krajina potvrdila dva prípady po 44 rokoch
content: BUKUREŠŤ - Dvaja ľudia v Rumunsku sa nakazili leprou. Ide o prvé potvrdené prípady tohto infekčného ochorenia v krajine za 44 rokov, oznámilo v piatok ministerstvo zdravotníctva. Informuje o tom agentúra Reuters. Lepra bola zistená u dvoch masérok z Indonézie vo veku 21 a 25 rokov zamestnaných v kúpeľoch v meste Kluž ležiacom na severozápade Rumunska, ktoré sa podrobili liečbe. Dve ďalšie osoby boli pre podozrenie z nákazy testované a čakajú na výsledky. Minister zdravotníctva Alexandru Rogobete pre agentúru Agerpres uviedol, že kúpeľní hostia nemusia mať obavy, pretože k prenosu choroby treba dlhodobý kontakt s chorým. Podľa neho sa jedna z masérok nedávno vrátila z Ázie, kde strávila mesiac so svojou matkou, ktorá je v súčasnosti v nemocnici, pretože u nej tiež zistili lepru. Úrady kúpele do ukončenia vyšetrovania zatvorili. Lepra sa vyskytuje najmä v Latinskej Amerike, v strednej Afrike a v juhovýchodnej Ázii, známe sú však aj prípady z južnej Európy, najmä Španielska, a tiež z Rumunska. title: Waadtländer Regierung lenkt im Streit mit Staatspersonal ein
content: Die Regierung habe dies an einer ausserordentlichen Sitzung entschieden, teilte der Staatsrat am Freitag mit. Sie schlage einen neuen Weg vor, um den sozialen Zusammenhalt wiederherzustellen und das zukünftige finanzielle Gleichgewicht des Kantons zu sichern. Der Staatsrat erwartet nun, dass die Staatsangestellten ihren Streik beenden. «Angesichts der getroffenen Massnahmen ist der Staatsrat der Ansicht, dass die Voraussetzungen für die Rechtmässigkeit des Streiks nicht mehr erfüllt sind», schreibt der Staatsrat im Communiqué weiter. Die Regierung kündigte zudem an, mit den Gewerkschaften verhandeln zu wollen. Die Regierung hatte Ende September ihr Budget für 2026 vorgelegt, das ein Defizit von 331 Millionen Franken und Sparmassnahmen in der Höhe von 305 Millionen Franken vorsieht.
creator: Agentur sda

title: Responsáveis da DGAE demitem-se após caso de professora brasileira impedida de dar aulas
content: Duas responsáveis da Direção-Geral da Administração Escolar (DGAE) demitiram-se na sequência do caso de uma professora brasileira impedida de lecionar em Portugal, apesar de ter habilitação profissional , informou esta sexta-feira o Ministério da Educação. "Após a análise aos procedimentos adotados pela DGAE relativamente ao processo de reconhecimento de qualificação profissional obtida no estrangeiro, duas diretoras de serviço apresentaram a demissão, tendo já cessado funções", refere a tutela numa nota enviada à agência Lusa. Já segue a Bola Branca no WhatsApp? É só clicar aqui O Ministério da Educação, Ciência e Inovação (MECI) pediu uma análise aos procedimentos seguidos pela direção-geral no processo de reconhecimento das qualificações na sequência do caso, noticiado a 21 de novembro, de uma professora brasileira que, apesar de ter habilitação, estava impedida de lecionar. A docente em causa, Alana Costa, formou-se no Brasil e estava a dar aulas em Portugal quando, em 2023, foi despedida e impedida de lecionar no país por não lhe ser reconhecida habilitação profissional. Segundo a DGAE, estava em falta um documento que teria de ser emitido pelo Ministério da Educação do Brasil, apesar de o governo brasileiro conferir às instituições federais de ensino superior autonomia para emitir esse diploma. Professora, formada no Brasil, foi despedida em 20(...) Ver mais Recusado o documento emitido pela Universidade de Brasília...

title: Est de la RDC : à l’ONU, les États-Unis accusent le Rwanda d’entraîner la région vers la « guerre »
content: L’ambassadeur des États-Unis à l’ONU, Mike Waltz © Michael M. Santiago / GETTY IMAGES NORTH AMERICA / Getty Images via AFP Par Jeune Afrique Publié le 12 décembre 2025 Lecture : 2 minutes. Fichier généré le L’ambassadeur américain à l’ONU a accusé vendredi le Rwanda, qui soutient le groupe armé M23 dans le conflit dans l’est de la République démocratique du Congo , de mener la région vers la « guerre ». « Au lieu d’une avancée vers la paix, comme nous l’avons vu sous la direction du président Trump ces dernières semaines, le Rwanda mène la région vers plus d’instabilité et vers la guerre », a déclaré Mike Waltz lors d’une réunion du Conseil de sécurité. Après que la RDC et le Rwanda ont signé il y a quelques jours seulement à Washington un « accord pour la paix » sous l’égide de Donald Trump , les États-Unis « sont profondément inquiets et de plus en plus déçus » de ce regain de violences, a-t-il insisté, dénonçant « l’ampleur et la sophistication » de l’implication du Rwanda dans l’est de la RDC. Les États-Unis détaillent les actions menées par le Rwanda en RDC et au Burundi « Les forces de défense rwandaises ont fourni un soutien matériel, logistique et en termes d’entraînement et se battent aux côtés du M23 en RDC avec environ 5 000 à 7 000 troupes début décembre, sans compter une possible augmentation » lors de la nouvelle offensive du M23 en cours, a-t-il affirmé. « Ces derniers mois, le Rwanda a déployé de nombreux...

title: حالة الطقس اليوم.. تدفق السحب الممطرة وفرص لسقوط الأمطار
content: كشفت الهيئة العامة للأرصاد الجوية، عن حالة الطقس خلال الساعات القادمة على بعض أنحاء البلاد. وقالت الأرصاد في منشور لها عبر صفحتها الرسمية على موقع التواصل الاجتماعي فيس بوك: هناك استمرار لتدفق السحب الممطرة على الوجه البحرى ومدن القناة ومناطق من السواحل الشمالية وشمال سيناء، يصاحبها سقوط أمطار متفاوتة الشدة. وأشار الأرصاد إلى أن فرصة سقوط الأمطار مازالت مستمرة على مناطق متفرقة من القاهرة الكبرى، وذلك بالتزامن مع أجواء باردة إلى مائلة للبرودة على معظم الأنحاء. اقرأ أيضاً: قرار جديد من التعليم بشأن المدارس الخاصة - مستند بعد تعديل اسمها لجامعة العاصمة.. ما الموقف القانوني لطلاب حلوان؟ متحدث التعليم: مهلة سداد مصروفات المدارس الخاصة عام دراسي واحد

title: Salvini torna alla centrale operativa Fs, garantito 100% servizio su l'AV Roma-Milano
content: (ANSA) - ROMA, 12 DIC - Il vicepremier e ministro Matteo Salvini ha visitato nuovamente la centrale operativa Fs per verificare le ripercussioni durante la giornata dello sciopero di oggi. I dati del pomeriggio mostrano un miglioramento del trend già positivo della mattina: l'AV Roma-Milano non ha subito alcun disagio ed è stato garantito il 100% del servizio. Il resto dell'alta velocità ha confermato il 90% dell'offerta e anche i regionali hanno garantito l'80% del servizio, segno che i lavoratori hanno premiato l'impegno dell'Azienda e del governo che ha da poco rinnovato i contratti. L'unico danno causato da Landini è nei confronti degli italiani che, nonostante la scarsa adesione, sono stati messi in difficoltà. Lo fa sapere la Lega. (ANSA).

title: Kano gov sympathises with residents as fire guts hospital
content: Kano State Governor, Abba Yusuf, has commiserated with residents of Rogo Local Government Area after a fire outbreak on Thursday destroyed parts of the Rogo General Hospital. The governor’s condolence was issued on Friday in a statement by his spokesperson, Sunusi Tofa, who described the incident as “unfortunate and deeply saddening,” adding that hospitals are critical lifelines that must be protected from disruption. The statement read, “His Excellency, Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf, expresses his heartfelt sympathy to the people of Rogo over the fire incident that destroyed sections of the General Hospital. “The government views this as a serious setback, especially to healthcare delivery in the area.” Yusuf ordered an immediate assessment of the damage and directed officials to submit a comprehensive report without delay. According to the statement, the governor also mandated the “full renovation and rehabilitation” of the affected parts of the hospital to ensure that medical services resume as quickly as possible. He further reaffirmed his administration’s commitment to improving healthcare infrastructure across the 44 local government areas of the state. “He assures the people of Rogo that the government will take every necessary step to rebuild the damaged facility and enhance service delivery,” the statement added. title: Produzenten-Legende Cohn mit 98 gestorben - Arthur? Hier spricht Hollywood!
content: Los Angeles – Er wirkte immer wie 69plus. Er wirkte ewig zeitlos: „Das Herz kennt kein Alter!“ Er rauchte nicht. Er trank nicht. Er joggte nicht. Er hatte kein Smartphone, nur ein altes Klapphandy ohne Screen. Er aß leicht. Er lachte viel. Hollywood-Legende Arthur Cohn, 98, (6 Oscars) ist im Himmel. Er schloss seine sanften Augen in Jerusalem, wie er es sich gewünscht hatte. In seinem Basler Penthouse ist Stille. Was war das Geheimnis dieses traumhaften Jahrhundert-Lebens? Mehr zum Thema Sechs Oscars krönen sein Lebenswerk : Hollywood-Legende Arthur Cohn gestorben Filmproduzent Arthur Cohn, sechsmaliger Oscar-Gewinner, starb mit 98 Jahren in Jerusalem. Arthur Cohn folgte seinen Lebensmaximen: + „Lebensglück sind Wurzeln und Flügel!“ + „Wer aufhört zu träumen, hat aufgehört zu leben!“ + „Sie müssen an das glauben, was Sie tun!“ Cohn (M.) und Friede Springer verband eine lange Freundschaft. Rechts: BILD-Autor Norbert Körzdörfer Foto: © Frank Zauritz Vor 70 Jahren war er ein Schweizer Sportreporter (Fußball, Eishockey). Sein Vater, ein großer jüdischer Anwalt, war ein Wegbereiter des neuen Israel. Arthur wurde seine eigene Hollywood-Legende und wohl der erfolgreichste Privat-Produzent der Welt („Der Garten der Finzi Contini“, „Die Kinder des Monsieur Mathieu“, „Das Etruskische Lächeln“). Filmproduzent Arthur Cohn (damals 78) posiert im Jahr 2005 mit Hollywood-Star Daryl Hannah (damals 45, r.) und Veronica Ferres (damals 40) bei der DIVA-Preisverleihung in München...

title: Akces NCBR i MON pomogą start-upom rozwinąć technologie obronne
content: W piątek w siedzibie Wojskowej Akademii Technicznej Cezary Tomczyk, wiceminister obrony narodowej, ogłosił nowy program akceleracyjny MilTech. Od poniedziałku będą mogły się do niego zgłaszać start-upy, mikro i małe firmy. Operatorem programu jest Akces NCBR, natomiast partnerem merytorycznym – Ministerstwo Obrony Narodowej (MON). – Rozmawiamy z Polską Grupą Zbrojeniową o partnerstwie wdrożeniowym – zapowiedziała Arleta Malasińska, prezes spółki Akces NCBR. MilTech wesprze młode spółki w rozwijaniu i komercjalizacji technologii. – Poprosiliśmy MON o zidentyfikowanie obszarów tematycznych. Postaramy się wyłonić najlepsze zespoły, które trafią do akceleracji – podkreśliła Arleta Malasińska. NCBR Akces i MON czekają na innowacyjne pomysły z zakresu m.in. technologii kosmicznych. Chodzi m.in. o systemy wykrywania i śledzenia obiektów kosmicznych, analitykę do przetwarzania danych przy ograniczonych możliwościach sprzętowych, a także o technologie zwiększające autonomię i bezpieczeństwo operacji w przestrzeni kosmicznej. Projekty mogą dotyczyć również bezpieczeństwa infrastruktury morskiej. Na liście oczekiwanych przez obie instytucje przedsięwzięć są m.in. platformy autonomiczne, rozwiązania dotyczące zaawansowanej komunikacji podwodnej, a także systemy przetwarzania i analizy danych z wielu źródeł. Kolejny rodzaj projektów to modułowe bezzałogowe statki powietrzne (BSP) stosowane w różnych typach prowadzenia walki. NCBR Akces i...

title: Presentan convocatoria de apoyo financiero para actores económicos
content: Con el objetivo de ampliar las capacidades del sector de las tecnologías de la información y las comunicaciones (TICs), mediante el apoyo a iniciativas innovadoras de toda Cuba que contribuyan a la transformación digital, fue presentada una convocatoria de apoyo financiero para nuevos actores económicos. Dirigida a mipymes estatales y privadas, cooperativas no agropecuarias y proyectos de desarrollo local, aspira a estimular nuevas soluciones tecnológicas con potencial de impacto a nivel local y capacidad de escalar hacia otros sectores económicos. Durante la feria expositiva de TICs asociadas al desarrollo local en Pinar del Río «TecnoPinar 2025», Hana Hudak, oficial de cooperación de la Unión Europea en la Isla, explicó que esta iniciativa facilitará el acceso a financiamiento al sector privado, hasta 20 mil dólares por iniciativa para la adquisición de equipamiento y recursos materiales. El proyecto «Apoyo a los nuevos actores económicos para una diversificación económica, innovadora y sostenible» es financiado por la Unión Europea e implementado por el Programa de las Naciones Unidas para el Desarrollo, la Cooperación Francesa en Cuba, el Ministerio de Economía y Planificación y su Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Económicas. Hudak refirió que deben ser iniciativas económicamente viables, replicables y escalables a nivel nacional. Hervé Alonclé, jefe de cooperación de la Agencia Francesa de Desarrollo, significó que esta, la cuarta...

title: On numara sonuçları yayında! 12 Aralık 2025 MP Online ile On Numara sonuçları öğrenme ekranı!
content: On Numara'nın 12 Aralık çekiliş sonuçları şans oyunu severlerin gündeminde. Bu hafta 531.558 TL'lik büyük ikramiye dikkat çekerken, kazanan numaralar çekiliş sonrası MPİ'nin online sistemi üzerinden erişime açılacak. İşte 12 Aralık On Numara sonuçları ve sorgulama ekranı... ON NUMARA SONUÇLARI 12 ARALIK 2025 Milli Piyango Online üzerinden haftada 2 kez oynanan On Numara Pazartesi çekilişi ile gündemde. Kazandıran numaralar 12 Aralık saat 20.00'de gerçekleşen çekilişle belli oluyor. İşte, çekiliş canlı yayını ve bilet sorgulama ekranı: ON NUMARA NASIL OYNANIR? Bir kolonda 80 numara bulunmaktadır. 80 numaradan 10 tanesi işaretlenir. Bir veya birden fazla kolon oynanabilir. Tek kolon ücreti 10 TL'dir. On Numara haftada 2 gün çekilir: Pazartesi ve Cuma günleri çekilir. Her çekilişte küre içerisindeki 80 numara içinden 22 numara çekilir. Oynadığın her kolon için çekilişte çıkan numaralardan 10, 9, 8, 7, 6 numara doğru tahmin edersen veya hiçbir numarayı tahmin edemezsen ikramiye kazanırsın. 10 numara bilen büyük ikramiyeyi kazanır!

title: Се шпекулираше дека ќе раскинат: Шер (79) откри дали ќе се омажи за 40 години помладиот избраник
content: Сепак како што соопштил тимот на пејачката таа вест е лажна. Исто така, имаше гласини дека двојката е на работ на раскинување, но ниту тоа не е вистина, а Шер изгледа позаљубена од кога било. „Апсолутно нема планови за брак во блиска иднина“, пренесе „E! Online“. Наводно, Шер сега има премногу деловни обврски на кои треба да се посвети, а на нејзиниот партнер воопшто не му пречи тоа. Шер и Александер се запознале во 2022 година на Неделата на модата во Париз, а тој веќе тогаш ја освоил со својот шарм и духовитост. Пред неа, Едвардс бил во врска со Амбер Роуз, со која добил син, но таа љубов била прилично бурна. Кога раскинале, Амбер го обвинила дека ја изневерил со 12 жени, а потоа тој дури и самиот го признал тоа. Сепак, Шер не се плаши од слична судбина и ужива во љубовта со Едвардс.
creator: Точка

title: Meloni vede Abu Mazen, focus sulla piena attuazione del piano di Trump
content: (ANSA) - ROMA, 12 DIC - La presidente del Consiglio, Giorgia Meloni, ha ricevuto oggi a Palazzo Chigi il presidente dell'Autorità nazionale palestinese Abu Mazen. Come riferisce una nota di Palazzo Chigi, "i due leader hanno discusso gli ultimi sviluppi nella regione e in particolare la necessità di consolidare il cessate il fuoco a Gaza attraverso la piena attuazione del Piano di Pace del Presidente Trump". Meloni, viene spiegato, "ha ribadito la determinazione dell'Italia a svolgere un ruolo di primo piano nella stabilizzazione e ricostruzione di Gaza, ricevendo il pieno sostegno del Presidente Abbas". La premier "ha anche rinnovato il supporto italiano al programma di riforme dell'Autorità palestinese, di fondamentale importanza anche nel quadro del necessario rilancio di un processo politico che conduca a una pace giusta e duratura basata sulla soluzione dei due Stati". (ANSA).

title: Bénin : mandat d’arrêt contre Kemi Seba, l’ancien ministre Candide Azannaï arrêté à Cotonou
content: Kemi Seba, leader du mouvement Urgence panafricaine et militant anticolonialiste béninois, arrive à l’aéroport de Niamey, au Niger, le 25 septembre 2023. © Balima Boureima/Anadolu Agency via AFP Par Mawunyo Hermann Boko Publié le 12 décembre 2025 Lecture : 2 minutes. Fichier généré le Ce 12 décembre, Cotonou a émis un mandat d’arrêt international contre l’activiste franco-béninois Kemi Seba , mais aussi contre Sabi Sira Korogone, président du Mouvement populaire de libération (MPL), pour « apologie du terrorisme » et « incitation à la révolte ». Selon une source judiciaire, ils risquent de 2 à 5 ans de prison et jusqu’à 10 millions de F CFA d’amende. Kemi Seba, par ailleurs conseiller spécial du président nigérien Abdourahamane Tiani , s’était, dans une première vidéo diffusée dans la matinée du 7 décembre, félicité du renversement de Patrice Talon avant que le putsch ne soit déjoué par les forces loyalistes. Il avait ensuite affirmé que ce n’était qu’un premier coup d’essai qui pourrait être réitéré si le chef de l’État béninois ne se remettait pas en question. « Aujourd’hui est le jour de la libération, notre peuple a été humilié, brimé, ostracisé, économiquement parlant discriminé et étouffé. [...] Ils ont mis aux arrêts le président Talon. [...] Le Bénin libre ou la mort », avait-t-il lancé dans les premières heures qui ont suivi la tentative de putsch. Azannaï entendu par la police judicaire L’ancien ministre de la...

title: Oyebanji targets 26,000 jobs through Ekiti Knowledge Zone
content: Ekiti State Governor, Mr Biodun Oyebanji, has reiterated his administration’s commitment to creating more than 26,000 direct and indirect jobs and injecting over $14 million into the state’s economy annually through the ongoing Ekiti Knowledge Zone (EKZ) project. Speaking on Friday at a Stakeholders’ Engagement Workshop held at Ikogosi Resort, the governor—represented by his Chief of Staff, Mr Niyi Adebayo—said the EKZ was conceived to position the state to benefit fully from global technological shifts. He described the engagement session as “a proactive step aimed at ensuring effective collaboration among all participants,” saying it would help build trust, promote innovation and ensure long-term success by harnessing diverse perspectives and preventing avoidable conflicts. Oyebanji said, “My government firmly believes that the prosperity of Ekiti State will be built on the strength of its people on their talents, creativity, resilience, and intelligence. “That is why this initiative was conceived as a hub where government, academia, innovators and the private sector can work together to solve real problems, accelerate public-sector transformation, and create new economic opportunities for our young people. “My vision for the state is one where many young Ekiti people can work for global companies without leaving their communities. “We will continue to provide an enabling environment not only to make the Knowledge Zone a success, but to make the entire state a model of...

title: Hit parade, Ultimo con l'album live primo tra album e vinili
content: (ANSA) - ROMA, 12 DIC - Il nuovo live album Ultimo Live Stadi 2025 debutta in vetta alla classifica degli album più venduti della settimana secondo le rilevazioni Fimi/Niq. L'album, che racchiude la set list completa dell'ultimo tour, è anche al numero 1 tra i cd, vinili e musicassette: nel giro di pochi mesi sono 2 i live album dell'artista che guadagnano la vetta. A maggio era stata la volta di Ultimo Live Stadi 2024, dopo 6 anni che un disco live di un artista italiano non raggiungeva il primo posto tra i dischi più venduti nella settimana di uscita. New entry anche al secondo posto, con Emis Killa che piazza la sua Musica Triste sul podio. Un progetto che per sonorità e linguaggio rappresenta la quintessenza del rap. Al terzo posto resiste, anche davanti alla valanga di uscite pre-natalizie, Olly con Tutta Vita (sempre), davanti al nuovo lavoro di Angelina Mango, tornata alla musica dopo un lungo periodo di stop, dal titolo Caramè, che dopo l'uscita in digitale arriva anche nella versione fisica e conquista il quarto posto. Il re della classifica della scorsa settimana Noyz Narcos scivola in quinta posizione con Funny Games. Sesta piazza per un altro album live: Memento Mori: Mexico City, il concerto dei Depeche Mode registrato durante le tre serate a Città del Messico nel 2023, in cui la band si è esibita davanti a oltre 200mila spettatori. Prima di un altro live, quello di Cesare Cremonini in Ottava posizione, si inserisce Michael Bublè con il natalizio...

title: Basketball: Rheinstars Köln fordern personell geschwächten Favoriten
content: Das Team von Trainer Zoran Kukic will in Göttingen seine Außenseiterchance nutzen. Eindeutiger könnten die Voraussetzungen kaum sein: Die Rheinstars reisen am Samstag als Außenseiter zur Partie in der zweiten Basketball-Bundesliga (Pro A) bei der BG Göttingen (18.30 Uhr). Daran ändert auch der 92:76-Erfolg der Mannschaft gegen die Gießen 46ers am vergangenen Wochenende nichts. Während die Niedersachsen nach ihrem Abstieg im vergangenen Sommer die umgehende Rückkehr in die Bundesliga anstreben und ihren Ambitionen mit erst zwei Saisonniederlagen weitgehend gerecht werden, steht für die Kölner der Klassenerhalt im Fokus. „Wir haben gegen Gießen hart gearbeitet, eine starke erste Halbzeit gespielt und sie in der zweiten Halbzeit in Schach gehalten. Zeitweise hatten wir auch etwas Glück, was nötig ist, um einen Gegner wie Gießen zu bezwingen“, erklärte Kukic. „Wir wissen genau, wie gut Göttingen ist und welche Ambitionen das Team hat, aber wir werden trotzdem alles daran setzen, auch einer solch starken Mannschaft Paroli zu bieten.“ Wie so häufig in dieser Spielzeit stehen die Kölner vor dem Duell mit dem Tabellenzweiten vor personellen Unwägbarkeiten. Während in der vergangenen Woche Mike Miller aus einer Verletzungspause zurückkehrte und das Repertoire auf der Aufbauposition neben Topscorer Cedric Russell (20 Punkte) mit starker Reboundarbeit erweiterte, fehlte der angeschlagene Hall Elisias mit seiner physischen Präsenz unter dem Korb. Ob der 2,03 Meter...

title: Presentan herramienta para medir cuatro contaminantes gaseosos
content: El nuevo dispositivo permite monitorizar en tiempo real oxígeno, sulfuro de hidrógeno, vapor de agua y dióxido de carbono en biogás y gas natural La empresa tecnológica ABB presentó Sensi+ NG, la última evolución de su analizador de gases contaminantes, diseñado para las industrias del biogás y el gas natural, informó Stefan Parmentier, Director Global de Producto. Este dispositivo incorpora ahora la medición de oxígeno, sumándose a sus capacidades de detectar sulfuro de hidrógeno, vapor de agua y dióxido de carbono y gracias a esta función, Sensi+ NG permite la monitorización continua y en tiempo real de los cuatro componentes gaseosos más críticos con un solo equipo, mejorando la seguridad operativa, aumentando la productividad y reduciendo el mantenimiento en entornos industriales. Parmentier explicó que los contaminantes presentes en el gas natural representan riesgos significativos para la seguridad y la integridad de las tuberías debido a la corrosión. Con este nuevo dispositivo los operadores pueden garantizar que biogás o biometano cumplen las estrictas normas de calidad antes de ser inyectados en la red de gas, asegurando un transporte seguro y fiable. La tecnología láser OA-ICOS permite obtener lecturas rápidas y fiables, mientras que el diseño del dispositivo minimiza la necesidad de consumibles, calibraciones frecuentes o mantenimiento complejo, reduciendo el número de equipos necesarios. Parmentier destacó que la solución original...

title: Mohamed Salah included in Liverpool squad to face Brighton after Arne Slot talks
content: The Dutchman had insisted he would have the final say on whether to bring back the Egypt international, who was omitted from the Champions League trip to Milan in midweek, following his explosive comments last weekend. After the Premier League draw at Leeds, the player said his relationship with the Reds boss had broken down, he had been “thrown under the bus” in response to recent results and suggested Saturday’s game could be his last for the club. Slot said at his press conference he had “no reasons (for) not wanting him to stay” but intimated there would have to be some form of conciliation from Salah for him to be reintegrated in what would be his last match before heading for the Africa Cup of Nations on Monday. But he insisted the final decision would be his – having spoken with sporting director Richard Hughes and other members of the club hierarchy – when leaving out the player in midweek. The Press Association understands Slot’s decision has been taken in what he feels is the best interests of the team. It will also provide some breathing space in the row as Salah will head for AFCON on Monday, during which a solution to the current situation will continue to be addressed. “We have spoken a lot in the last week after the Sunderland game. There were a lot of conversations between his representatives and ours, our representatives and him, between him and me,” said Slot at his 9am press conference. “I think we decided as a club – and I was part of that decision – not...

title: Montceau-les-Mines. Rugby : la Ville cède un terrain pour la création d’un bâtiment
content: La vieille casquette a vécu. Cette avancée qui recouvre une partie des gradins du stade de rugby Jean Bouveri à Montceau va être enlevée prochainement. Tout près, un nouvel équipement sportif va apparaître. Le lieu accueillera un club-house, des bureaux pour les salariés du rugby club Montceau Bourgogne (RCMB) ou encore une zone de stockage de matériel. Il sera aussi ouvert sur l’extérieur avec des espaces d’accueil pour les entreprises, clubs sportifs et établissements scolaires qui souhaiteraient y tenir des formations. 500 mètres carrés de terrain Début novembre, pour accompagner ce projet, les élus ont adopté en conseil municipal la cession à l’euro symbolique au club d’un terrain communal de 500 mètres carrés. Une opération possible lorsque le projet répond à un objectif d’intérêt général. « L’intérêt général du projet qui contribue au dynamisme associatif n’est plus à prouver » a indiqué Marie-Claude Jarrot, maire. « Ça va changer la configuration du complexe » Laquelle se félicite des travaux à venir : « On va enlever la casquette, ça va changer la configuration du complexe. » La Ville va de plus soutenir la réalisation de l’équipement par l’octroi d’une subvention de 50 000 € versée sur trois ans à partir de 2026. Des actions ouvertes sur l’extérieur Le conseil a également adopté le versement d’une subvention de fonctionnement de 50 000 € au RCMB qui mène des actions dans les quartiers et écoles. « L’association a...

title: Veterans’ graves in Elburn cemeteries to get wreath honors
content: Joseph Bowdish, a veteran of the War of 1812, is buried in Blackberry Township Cemetery in Elburn . Philip Arthur Van Vlack, a veteran of the Spanish American War is also buried there. So is Civil War veteran Aaron W. Chase, and veterans of World War I, World War II, Korea, Vietnam, Gulf and those from non-combat eras, records show. The 380 headstones of veterans’ graves in St. Gall and Blackberry Township cemeteries in Elburn will have postings of live balsam wreaths on Saturday, Dec. 13, as part of Wreaths Across America Day, according to a news release. Venturing Crew-Elburn 413 raised $6,460 all year to cover the $17-per-wreath cost, Elburn coordinator Bruce Aderman said. The Venturing Crew is a youth-led coed program within Scouting America for teenagers and young adults age 14 through 20. They will place the wreaths at 100 graves at 9 a.m. at St. Gall Cemetery, 709 N. Main St./Illinois Route 47 and at 280 graves at 10:15 a.m. at Blackberry Township Cemetery, 677 S. Main St./Route 47, Aderman said. Volunteers from the public are also welcome to lay wreaths, he said. “We have wreaths. If you want to lay one, you can show up,” Aderman said. “After the Blackberry Township (wreath-laying) at 11:15-11:30 a.m., you are welcome for lunch at the Legion, 112 N. Main St.” Obscurity Brewing in Elburn donated the barbecue for the lunch, Aderman said. “They also donated rolls and cole slaw. We are going to do the beans, cookies, coffee and hot chocolate,” Aderman said. “Lunch is on...

title: Hunter council suspend net zero funding to reduce financial pressure
content: A Hunter council has voted to suspend all non-legislated net zero expenditure to reduce the financial pressure on the council. The decision by Cessnock councillors prevents the council from committing funds to its long-term Climate Change Resilience Plan, which is projected to cost more than $15 million across the next 25 years. The motion was put forward by councillor Quintin King, who said the proposal was not about climate change. Instead, it was designed to avoid speculative savings by assessing each net-zero project on a case-by-case basis. Cr King labelled the vote a "win for ratepayers" who were "doing it tough". "Households are battling cost-of-living pressures, and they expect council to spend their money wisely," he said. "Council has made the responsible decision to pause a discretionary plan based on 25-year modelling and instead focus on what our community actually needs: real savings and strong financial management." The decision will still allow potential net-zero projects to proceed if a business case determines they have merit. "Good projects will still go ahead. What we have stopped is an entire 25-year agenda being pushed onto ratepayers without guaranteed returns," Cr King said. "From here on, every proposal must justify itself and demonstrate real value. That's what financial responsibility looks like." Cr Sophie Palmowski warned against underestimating the impact small initiatives had in combating climate change. "Net zero is not an issue to be fobbed...

title: Councils still 'no further in front' on RFS 'red fleet' ownership saga
content: Local councils are "no closer" to finding a solution to ownership issues plaguing the NSW Rural Fire Service (RFS) "red fleet" vehicles. or signup to continue reading This week the NSW government released its Response to the Parliamentary Accounts Committee's (PAC) Inquiry into Assets, Premises and Funding of the NSW Rural Fire Service (RFS), and Tamworth mayor Russell Webb said "we are no further in front than we were a year ago or even five years ago". The government's response to the major recommendations that the assets be recognised as the property of the NSW RFS, has effectively been to "kick it down the road" by deciding an assets audit, condition assessments and business case must all be undertaken before a decision to transfer the assets is made, Cr Webb said. Under legislation councils are responsible in terms of ownership of the "red fleet", with the vehicles put "on council books", meaning ratepayers ended up subsidising the service. "Yet councils have no control over what [the RFS] purchases or what they sell," Cr Webb said. "These assets sit on our financials, so ... automatically become a liability to council." Tamworth Regional Council (TRC), through the Country Mayors Association (CMA), has been in discussions with the government for "some years now" about the issue. Earlier this year Cr Webb said it was understood the NSW government would transfer the fleet's ownership to the NSW government and the NSW RFS. But this had not happened. "We're very...

title: Crisis shelter’s new home seeks final step from city of DeKalb
content: Though a groundbreaking already marked the ceremonial start to a new facility for a DeKalb -based domestic violence crisis shelter, the nonprofit behind the build still needs final approval from the city for construction. The amended plan – from a two-story, 42,000-square-foot space originally proposed in 2020, to a 14,025-square-foot one-story building – is expected to go before the city’s Planning and Zoning Commission Monday. The meeting starts at 6 p.m. at the DeKalb Public Library, 309 Oak St. Safe Passage Inc. hosted a groundbreaking ceremony Dec. 5 at 217 Franklin St., the latest in a goal first announced about five years ago. Construction is expected to begin in the spring with a completion goal of sometime in 2026, agency staff previously told Shaw Local. Rebecca Versluys, executive director of Safe Passage, told a crowd during that ceremony that their efforts will mean lives saved. “[Domestic violence] is not a distant problem. It’s in our neighborhoods, it affects our coworkers, our family and our friends,” Versluys said. “Our shelter will be a place where survivors can rebuild their lives with dignity. A place where they will be met with compassion and understanding from our staff. This shelter will be a place where they can start to heal.” Calling this phase “New Beginnings,” agency staff said in a news release that the 24/7 services they provide to those in need will improve with the new facility. The agency has historically been private about its address. But...

title: Meurthe-et-Moselle. À Baccarat, ce fan de Noël décore sa maison de façon XXL : « C’est une bulle de rêves »
content: Depuis trois ans, Jean-Charles Masson, un habitant de Baccarat , décore sa maison à l’arrivée de Noël. Mais cette décoration ne se résume pas à simplement quelques guirlandes sur sa devanture. Bien au contraire. C’est l’entièreté de sa façade et de son jardin qui scintillent à la tombée de la nuit, et qui plongent les voisins et visiteurs dans une ambiance féerique digne des films. « J’ai toujours été attiré par les fêtes de Noël, j’ai toujours aimé ce côté fédérateur, bulle de rêves et c’est le message que j’ai envie de passer aux gens à travers ces décors », explique-t-il simplement dans un premier lieu. D’une année sur l’autre, les décors deviennent de plus en plus importants. « Mais on réutilise certains de nos équipements », détaille le Bachamois. title: Valentigney. Spectacle de drones, quarante exposants : le marché de Noël déménage et voit plus grand
content: Lancé il y a quelques années pendant le premier mandat du maire Philippe Gautier, le marché de Noël de Valentigney, traditionnellement organisé sur une journée, fait son retour ce dimanche. Il est marqué par plusieurs nouveautés. D’abord son déménagement. Fini, la place Peugeot face à la mairie. Le voilà sur le site des Longines. La Ville ne fait qu’anticiper une décision inéluctable puisque de gros travaux doivent commencer face à la mairie 2026 et allaient nécessiter son déménagement. Artisanat local Il y aura une quarantaine d’exposants, soit un peu plus que la trentaine habituellement présents. « Ils mettront à l’honneur le savoir-faire local », assure Philippe Gautier. Quelques food-trucks seront présents pour la restauration et la buvette sera assurée par l’association de l’harmonie municipale. Pour marquer le coup de ce déménagement, un spectacle de drones lumineux sera proposé à 18 h et 20 h. « Le spectacle s’appelle Le Songe de Noël , il est proposé par la même société qui avait réalisé celui sur Etienne Oehmichen pour Capitale française de la culture », rappelle le maire boroillot. Le spectacle avait agréablement surpris les spectateurs en 2024. Cette nouvelle version est une bonne opportunité « pour accompagner ce changement de lieu ». title: Κλήμης: «Σκεφτείτε τι λέγαμε μετά την κλήρωση – Θα είναι έγκλημα...» / «Ελπίζουμε να κάνουμε καλό και της Ομόνοιας»
content: Ο παλαίμαχος άσος της ΑΕΚ και πιστός ακόλουθος της σκαλιώτικης ομάδας, εντός κι εκτός έδρας, σε Κύπρο και Ευρώπη με τους «Boys On Tour», ο Κλήμης Αλεξάνδρου, μίλησε το πρωί της Παρασκευής (12/12) στον Supersport 104.Σε μια ωραία συζήτηση με τους Άλκη Μπότσο και Ανδρέα Πογιατζή στην εκπομπή «Καλημέρα στα ΣΠΟΡ», αναφέρθηκε για την ισοπαλία της ομάδας του απέναντι στη σουηδική Χέκεν στο Γκέτεμποργκ, όπου χάθηκε η νίκη στις λεπτομέρειες και για τις πιθανότητες πρόκρισης της ομάδας του μέσω της οκτάδας στη League Phase του Conference League. Αφού μέσω της 24άδας είναι δεδομένη η συμμετοχή των κιτρινοπράσινων στα πλέι οφ της διοργάνωσης για την ώρα.«Θα είναι... έγκλημα», όπως είπε, να μην προκριθεί μέσω της οκτάδας στους «16» η ΑΕΚ, ενώ χαριτολογώντας απάντησε ότι μετά από την ήττα από την Ομόνοια στο πρωτάθλημα η ομάδα του πήγε και κέρδισε ΑΖ Άλκμααρ με 4-0. Και βάσει αυτού, με χιούμορ, είπε «μακάρι να κερδίσουμε την Ομόνοια (σ.σ. την ερχόμενη Δευτέρα) και θα της κάνουμε καλό που θα πάει να παίξει μετά με τη Ράκοφ και να την κερδίσει».Μίλησε επίσης για το πρωτάθλημα και εξέφρασε πολλές απόψεις όσον αφορά διάφορα θέματα για την ομάδα του.ΤΟ ΗΧΗΤΙΚΟ:The post Κλήμης: «Σκεφτείτε τι λέγαμε μετά την κλήρωση – Θα είναι έγκλημα...» / «Ελπίζουμε να κάνουμε καλό και της Ομόνοιας» appeared first on Super Sport FM.
creator: χρίστος θεοχάρους

title: Make December 13 ‘National Awareness Day’
content: Every December 13 allows Saint Lucians my age to sit awhile, look back and ahead, with nostalgia and mixed feelings, about the way this date has forever affected our island’s history, in ways many still don’t comprehend. Every year I refer here to it as ‘A Holiday for Nothing’ – and not for nothing, because it celebrates a Big Lie that’s lived with us from the day Christopher Columbus falsely claimed that he ‘Discovered’ Saint Lucia. It’s impossible to ‘discover’ lands with people and civilizations, so every such claim by Columbus and the Europeans who came after accidentally sighting Haiti in 1492, when he thought he was in a part of India they subsequently misnamed the ‘West Indies’. But, as even a simple Google search will prove today, Columbus lied, as in this result: ‘Christopher Columbus is traditionally credited with “discovering” St. Lucia for Europeans in 1502, naming it Santa Lucia after Saint Lucy of Syracuse because he sighted it on her feast day (December 13th). However, historical evidence suggests he may not have landed there, with some accounts pointing to earlier sightings by Spanish navigator Juan de la Cosa or even French pirates, though Columbus’s naming tradition stuck, even as the island was later colonized by the French and British.’ Septuagenarians here grew-up celebrating ‘Discovery Day’ on December 13 as a Public Holiday to celebrate Columbus with two main highlights in Castries: the ‘Greasy Pole’ battle on Columbus Square between men eagerly...

title: На стимулирование деторождения израильтян в Негеве выделят 100 млн шекелей
content: На специальном заседании, которое состоится в воскресенье в Димоне, правительство утвердит национальную программу по стимулированию демографического роста и устойчивого экономического развития населенных пунктов Восточного Негева – Арад, Димона, Йерухам и Мицпе-Рамон. На реализацию этой программы в 2026 году будет выделено более 100 миллионов шекелей. Цель программы – стимулировать демографический рост и укрепить поселения в Восточном Негеве посредством всеобъемлющего и адаптированного ответа на возникшие потребности. Программа направлена на укрепление местной устойчивости, привлечение нового населения и создание качественных двигателей роста в Восточном Негеве. Премьер-министр Биньямин Нетаниягу: «В последние месяцы правительство под моим руководством инициировало создание беспрецедентных национальных программ для населённых пунктов Негева, приняло решение о выделении 3,2 миллиарда шекелей для приграничных населённых пунктов, о превращении Беэр-Шевы в мегаполис с инвестициями более чем в миллиард шекелей, о заключении зонтничных соглашений в Димоне и Йерухаме и о строительстве тысяч единиц жилья с инвестированием миллиардов в развитие инфраструктуры в сочетании с ускорением роста в Йерухаме и дальнейшим позиционированием Димоны как ведущего города в развитии всего Негева. Инвестирование ресурсов происходит в рамках широкой программы по укреплению Негева. Дополнительные инвестиции в Йерухам, Димону, Арад и Мицпе-Рамон являются значительным и необходимым...
creator: Андрей Яшлавский

title: Privan de libertad a docente sindicado de actos lascivos en Buchivacoa
content: Tal cual como lo reseño la policía del estado Falcón acantonada en el Centro de Coordinación Policial Nro. 15 con sede en la región Occidente, donde realizaron la aprehensión de un docente sindicado de acoso sexual adolescentes que residen en la parroquia Goajiro en el municipio Buchivacoa en la región del Occidente de Falcón.La policía de Falcón bajo la coordinación del comisario jefe Wimmy González, realizó el procedimiento de captura del victimario pasando la novedad a la fiscalía del Ministerio Público.Privándolo de la libertad el Tribunal Segundo de Primera Instancia de control con competencia en delitos de violencia contra la mujer.Explicó el jefe policial que el aprehendido identificado como Yaxon José de 46 años de edad, con residencia en la parroquia Goajiro sector Nueva Haciendita, calle principal, sindicado al momento del procedimiento de acoso; lo privaron por los delitos de acoso y hostigamiento en perjuicio de una adolescente de 15 años de edad.Puedes leer: La FANB destruye cuatro presuntas narcofincas en ZuliaAsí mismo por abuso sexual sin penetración a tres jóvenes de 12, 13 y 14 años de edad.Entren tanto la Policía de Falcón al mando del Gral. Miguel Morales Miranda continúa atendiendo a las comunidades y extendiendo programas dirigidos a niños, niñas, adolescentes, padres y representantes en materia preventivas.Con información Prensa PolifalcónÚnete a nuestro canal de noticias en WhatsAppPrivan de libertad a docente sindicado...

title: Štrajk paralizirao Italiju: sindikati ustali protiv proračuna Georgije Meloni, na ulicama pola milijuna ljudi
content: Nacionalni štrajk najvećeg talijanskog sindikata , organiziran u znak prosvjeda protiv proračuna premijerke Giorgije Meloni za 2026. godinu, izveo je u petak tisuće ljudi na ulice i poremetio rad vlakova, škola i drugih javnih službi diljem zemlje. Sindikat CGIL procjenjuje da se oko 61 posto svih zaposlenika javnog i privatnog sektora pridružilo štrajku prosvjedu, dok je više od 500.000 ljudi sudjelovalo na prosvjednim skupovima u glavnim talijanskim gradovima. CGIL ima oko pet milijuna članova, od kojih su polovina umirovljenici. Sindikati kritiziraju proračunske potrošnje na obranu Policijske procjene o broju prosvjednika nisu odmah bile dostupne. “Većina radnika koja pokreće ovu zemlju ne slaže se i ne prihvaća proračun ove vlade. Danas se jasnije nego ikad vidi da trebamo promjenu”, rekao je šef CGIL-a Maurizio Landini na skupu u Firenzi. CGIL, zajedno s drugim sindikatima, kritizirao je planirano povećanje proračunske potrošnje na obranu te je pozvao na više ulaganja u zdravstvo i obrazovanje te mjere koje bi dovele do povećanja plaća i mirovina. Vlada kaže da proračun, koji su dobro primila financijska tržišta i rejting agencije, osnažuje talijanske javne financije dok smanjuje poreze za srednje dohotke. U Italiji se proteklih mjeseci nižu nacionalni štrajkovi i prosvjedi protiv vladinih gospodarskih politika i podrške Izraelu. Desničarska stranke Giorgije Meloni, Braća Italije, uvjerljivo vodi u anketama, a njezina vladajuća...
creator: helena kolar, hina

title: Para prezydencka zachęca do wsparcia Wigilijnego Dzieła Pomocy Dzieciom
content: Prezydent Karol Nawrocki i pierwsza dama Marta Nawrocka zachęcili do udziału w Wigilijnym Dziele Pomocy Dzieciom. W ramach inicjatywy co roku ponad 100 tys. najmłodszych otrzymuje m.in. posiłki, przybory szkolne, stypendia uczniowskie i niezbędne leczenie i rehabilitację. Para prezydencka w opublikowanym w piątek nagraniu zachęciła do udziału w Wigilijnym Dziele Pomocy Dzieciom. W tym roku przebiega ono pod hasłem „Świeca, która tworzy polską Wigilię”. – Jest to ogromnie ważne i cenne przedsięwzięcie, a jednocześnie wspaniałe świadectwo miłosierdzia oraz wspólnoty obywatelskiej i jedności ducha chrześcijańskiego, bo to dzieło prowadzą razem polscy katolicy, ewangelicy i prawosławni – powiedział prezydent Nawrocki. Zaznaczył, że obecne od 35 lat w polskich domach świece Caritasu „symbolizują ciepło, serdeczność, uroczysty i radosny charakter świąt Bożego Narodzenia, a przede wszystkim są znakiem solidarności z bliźnimi”. – Niech również w tym roku na naszych stołach przy rodzinnej wieczerzy zapłonie to światło pełne piękna i dobra – zaapelował prezydent. JG, PAP
creator: jg, pap

title: Der MVV-Verkehrsverbund wächst Richtung Allgäu
content: Der Münchner Verkehrs- und Tarifverbund (MVV) wächst weiter. Der Kreis Oberallgäu wird zum 1. Januar 2027 beitreten, wie eine MVV-Sprecherin mitteilte. Den Angaben zufolge ist der MVV einer der größten Verkehrsverbünde in Deutschland. Der Bezirksrat in Marktoberdorf hatte der Mitgliedschaft einstimmig zugestimmt. „Wir schaffen für die Menschen im Ostallgäu einen deutlich einfacheren Zugang zu Bussen und Bahnen – vom täglichen Arbeitsweg bis zum Wochenendausflug“, sagte Landrätin Maria Rita Zinnecker (CSU) laut Mitteilung. „Der Beitritt zum MVV ist ein entscheidender Schritt hin zu einem leistungsstarken Nahverkehr, der unserer mobilen, pendler- und touristisch geprägten Region gerecht wird.“ Zum Jahreswechsel werden in wenigen Wochen die Landkreise Garmisch-Partenkirchen und Mühldorf am Inn sowie die Stadt und der Landkreis Landshut dem dann 13.600 Quadratkilometer großen Verbundgebiet beitreten. Verkehrsverbund Tarifverbund Allgäu De mainpost

title: Si schianta con un'auto, muore in ospedale ad Ascoli un centauro di 28 anni
content: ASCOLI - E' deceduto Danilo Ciarrocchi , il centauro di 28 anni che a bordo di una motocicletta Honda si è scontrato, questa mattina, con una Fiat Freemont lungo la Piceno Aprutina. Lo schianto è avvenuto all'altezza della rotatoria in località Battente . L'auto era guidata da un 64enne. Codice rosso Il giovane era stato trasportato in codice rosso al pronto soccorso dell'ospedale Mazzoni di Ascoli. I sanitari hanno tentato di salvargli la vita, ma non ci sono riueciti.

title: Preview- Muckalee chase historic All-Ireland football success
content: This time of the year is normally sees Kilkenny camogie and hurling clubs excelling on the provincial and national stages but this weekend makes a welcome change as Muckalee compete in the All-Ireland junior football championship final on Sunday. The side from the north of the county have cleaned up at local level in the past few seasons, taking over the mantle from the likes of Railyard but they’ve pushed it on even further with this All-Ireland final appearance. The Leinster final victory was a massive stepping stone for the side as they became the first from the county in 21 years to win a title at provincial level but even that came with a bit of an asterisk. Railyard were the team to win a first Leinster title for a Kilkenny club in 2004 when seeing off Leixlip of Kildare in Portlaoise but being the only team in the county playing ladies football at the time they played their championship football in Laois, so it was certainly a strange turn of events. The North Kilkenny outfit then reached another Leinster decider a couple of years later but lost to Killoe of Longford by three points in the 2008 Leinster intermediate final. It’s been a largely fallow period outside of Kilkenny ever since. Muckalee did get a taste for it when reaching the Leinster final in 2022 and although they went down to O’Dwyers of Dublin on a 4-8 to 0-7 scoreline, the game gave them a small taste of what it was like to compete against some of the bigger Gaelic football counties within the...

title: El país donde nadie acepta perder: anatomía del colapso electoral hondureño
content: Por: Cecilia Graciela Rodríguez Balmaceda/Latinoamérica21 La noche del 30 de noviembre, Honduras encendió de nuevo todas sus alarmas. Lo que debía ser una jornada electoral con resultados rápidos y una transición ordenada terminó convirtiéndose en un proceso lleno de interrupciones, acusaciones cruzadas y una sensación generalizada de que el país había retrocedido varios años en materia democrática. Más de una semana después, el país sigue sin un resultado definitivo y con los candidatos Nasry Asfura, del Partido Nacional y Salvador Nasralla, candidato en esta oportunidad por el Partido Liberal, alternándose el liderazgo por márgenes mínimos. Lo que podría interpretarse como una disputa técnica terminó derivando en un episodio más amplio de inestabilidad política. No porque exista evidencia clara de manipulación electoral, sino porque Honduras llega a esta elección con un entramado institucional frágil, erosionado y sin anclas de confianza suficientes. En este contexto, cualquier irregularidad —real, potencial o simplemente imaginada— activa los reflejos de crisis que el país ha acumulado en la última década. Un resultado estrecho en un sistema sin segunda vuelta El primer corte presentado por el Consejo Nacional Electoral (CNE), con solo el 57% de las actas procesadas, ya anticipaba una noche difícil. Las interrupciones posteriores en la transmisión, los cambios de tendencia en el conteo y la ausencia de explicaciones convincentes reactivaron...

title: GFL Bowl - Football-Spektakel kehrt nach Dresden zurück
content: Dresden bekommt erneut das größte Football-Spiel Deutschlands! Am 3. Oktober steigt der GFL Bowl wieder im Rudolf-Harbig-Stadion. Die Rückkehr war nach dem Erfolg des Vorjahres fast Pflicht. Über 22.000 Fans sorgten 2024 für eine Mega-Atmosphäre, dazu kamen 663.000 eingeschaltete Haushalte bei DF1 – Traumwerte für American Football in Deutschland. AFVD-Präsident Fuad Merdanovic erklärt: „Wir freuen uns, dass wir das so beliebte Kommentatoren-Team Spengemann & Motzkus wieder gewinnen konnten – für die Powerparty vor dem Spiel und die TV-Übertragung.“ Es hat mit ihrem Verlobten zu tun : Warum Taylor Swift HIER völlig entsetzt ist 00:48 Quelle: BILD / NFL 09.12.2025 TV-Star Carsten Spengemann zu BILD: „Seit dem Neustart vor drei Jahren ist der GFL Bowl stetig gewachsen. Letzten Oktober war der Hammer! Aber ich bin mir sicher, wir toppen das und machen den 3. Oktober hier in Dresden zum Football-Feiertag.“ Auch die Stadt Dresden ist begeistert. Sport-Bürgermeister Dornhauser sagt: „Zur Sportstadt Dresden passt der GFL Bowl einfach perfekt. Wir würden uns freuen, wenn es über 2026 hinaus weitergeht.“ Der Ticketverkauf läuft bereits. Und GFL-Chef Axel Streich verspricht moderate Preise: „Wir wollen jedem die Möglichkeit geben, das kommende Finale zu erleben. Daher gibt es Tickets ab 15 Euro.“ Mehr zum Thema Kolumne von Carsten Spengemann : Das fröhlichste Wiedersehen mit der Ex der NFL Die Detroit Lions müssen gegen die LA Rams ran. Ein Duell der Ex. Die neue...

title: ΑΠΟΕΛ: Απόφαση που λέει πολλά
content: Με τον Πιέρο Σωτηρίου να είναι τραυματίας και τους Τομάς και Μάγιερ να είναι τιμωρημένοι, η απόφαση της ομάδας να αφήσει εκτός αποστολής τον Μαρκίνιος λέει πολλά.Ο Βραζιλιάνος ακραίος επιθετικός, φέτος δείχνει να μην είναι στα πλάνα του Πάμπλο Γκαρσία, με πληροφορίες να κάνουν λόγο οτι έμεινε εκτός αποστολής και για εξωαγωνιστικούς λόγους.Τώρα τα δεδομένα και τα σενάρια για το μέλλον του Βραζιλιάνου άσσου στους γαλαζοκίτρινους δίνουν και παίρνουν, αλλά το μόνο σίγουρο είναι ότι το θέμα θα το διαχειριστούν εσωτερικά από την ομάδα.The post ΑΠΟΕΛ: Απόφαση που λέει πολλά appeared first on Super Sport FM.

title: Arribó a Santiago de Cuba donativo proveniente de Martinica
content: Un cargamento de 14.5 toneladas de medicamentos, alimentos, ropa y artículos de primera necesidad arribó a esta ciudad como parte de un donativo proveniente de Lamentin, Martinica, destinado a apoyar a la población tras el paso del huracán Melissa. Judith Laborieux, vicealcaldesa de la Seguridad Civil de Lamentin, explicó que el envío incluye medicinas, artículos de aseo y juguetes para niños, algunos aportados por la cooperación médica de esa localidad y otros adquiridos gracias a donaciones económicas realizadas por ciudadanos martiniqueños. Yaneidis Hechavarría, presidenta del Consejo de Defensa Municipal, señaló a la Agencia Cubana de Noticias que este donativo contribuirá a paliar la compleja situación que enfrenta el municipio, especialmente en el sector de la salud. Los medicamentos serán distribuidos a las instituciones sanitarias y, a través de ellas, llegarán directamente a la población. Hechavarría agradeció el gesto solidario y emitió un mensaje de felicitación al pueblo de Martinica, resaltando que su apoyo constituye una muestra de hermandad y cooperación en momentos difíciles para Santiago de Cuba.
creator: daynet

title: Canturosas aclara: la reforma a vapeadores no criminaliza a consumidores
content: Ciudad de México.-El diputado federal Carlos Canturosas aclaró que la reforma a la Ley General de Salud, recientemente aprobada en la Cámara de Diputados, ha generado desinformación sobre sus alcances reales.Canturosas señaló que la prohibición tiene un objetivo de salud pública: proteger a niñas, niños y jóvenes de los daños comprobados que provocan los cigarrillos electrónicos y dispositivos similares. Recordó que, según la ENSANUT 2022, más de 500 mil adolescentes entre 10 y 16 años ya han usado estos productos, un dato que calificó como alarmante.“Se han difundido mentiras y fake news que aseguran que buscamos criminalizar a quienes consumen vapeadores. Eso es totalmente falso; no te van a meter a la cárcel pues esto no es un delito”, afirmó el legislador.El diputado explicó que la reforma busca prevenir daños comprobados a la salud pues estudios de autoridades sanitarias han demostrado que estos dispositivos contienen sustancias que afectan los sistemas respiratorio, cardiovascular, metabólico y neurológico.Promover la Protección de menores ante estrategias de mercadotecnia engañosas dirigida a jóvenes que los presenta como productos “inofensivos”, lo que favorece la adicción temprana a la nicotina y otros compuestos.Así como la prevención dentro de una política integral de salud para reducir riesgos emergentes, contribuir a un entorno saludable y disminuir costos futuros para el sistema de salud.“Esta es una respuesta firme y urgente ante...

title: Огромно признание за български съдия
content: България ще има двама съдии в Категория 1 на ранглистата на ФИФА за 2026-а година, след като днес стана ясно, че Радослав Гидженов се изкачва от втората категория. УЕФА обяви промените и новите лица в ранглистите за втората част от сезон 2025/26, като новите лица в най-високата "категория Елит" са шестима, а един е изваден. В "Категория 1" новите лица са 14, сред тях е и Радослав Гидженов от България, който се присъединява към другия българин там – Георги Кабаков. За първи път при новото категоризиране на съдиите в Европа двама българи заедно ще бъдат във второто ниво на международните футболни арбитри. свързани статии Скандално: Цецо Найденов изригна срещу "корумпетата" и намеси Георги Кабаков Георги Кабаков отново ще свири на Лудогорец УЕФА ги цени: Кабаков и Гидженов ще свирят на европейски колоси 34-годишният Гидженов до момента през есента на 2025-а година има седем мача в Европа, един от които квалификация в Шампионската лига. За последно той ръководи мач зад граница на 27-и ноември, когато се представи отлично в мача за Лигата на конференциите Омония (Кипър) – Динамо Киев (Украйна) и беше оценен отлично от съдийския наблюдател Конрад Плауц (Австрия). Новите съдии в Категория Елит са Eрик Ламбрехтс (Белгия), Кристофър Кавана (Англия), Никълъс Уолш (Шотландия), Свен Яблонски (Германия), Донатас Румшас (Литва) и Раде Обренович (Cловения). Анастасиос Сидиропулос от Гърция е свален от Категория Елит в Категория 1.

title: EU friert russisches Vermögen dauerhaft ein
content: Die EU hat eine wichtige Grundlage für die Nutzung von russischem Staatsvermögen für die Ukraine geschaffen. Eine große Mehrheit von Mitgliedstaaten stimmte dafür, eine Rückübertragung von in der EU festgesetzten Mitteln nach Russland unbefristet zu verbieten, wie die derzeitige dänische EU-Ratspräsidentschaft mitteilte. title: Türk gemisi Rusya tarafından vuruldu
content: Rusya, Ukrayna’nın Odessa kentinde demirli olan Türk yük gemisini vurdu. Cenk Shipping Group’a ait M/V CENK T isimli gemi, Odessa Limanı'na yaklaşırken füze saldırısına uğradı. Firma yaptığı açıklama ile geminin, Karasu – Odessa hattında tır taşımacılığı yapan filosunun bir parçası olarak, 16:00’da Chornomorsk Limanı'na yaklaşırken saldırıya uğradığını duyurdu. Saldırı sonrasında gemide yangın çıktı. Yangına müdahale edildiği belirtilirken olayda can kaybı ya da yaralanma olmadı. Sürecin, resmi makamlarla işbirliği içinde takip edildiği belirtildi. FİRMA AÇIKLAMASI Şirketten yapılan açıklama şu şekilde: "Cenk Denizcilik filosunda, Karasu – Odesa hattında tır taşımacılığı yapan M/V CENK T isimli gemimiz, bugün yerel saatle 16:00’da Chornomorsk limanına yanaşmasının ardından balistik füze saldırısına maruz kalmıştır. Saldırı sonrasında gemimizin pruva tarafında meydana gelen yangına römorkörler, liman yangın söndürme birimleri ve gemi ekiplerimiz tarafından derhal müdahale edilmiş ve edilmeye devam edilmektedir. Şu ana kadar herhangi bir can kaybı veya yaralanma bilgisi bulunmamaktadır. Mevcut bilgiler doğrultusunda hasar yalnızca maddi niteliktedir. Olay uluslararası denizcilik kuralları çerçevesinde değerlendirilmekte olup, ilgili resmi makamlarla tam işbirliği içinde süreci yakından takip ediyoruz. Gelişmelere ilişkin teyit edilmiş bilgiler kamuoyu ile paylaşılmaya devam edilecektir. Saygılarımızla Cenk Denizcilik"
creator: turktimecom

title: Gen Zorawar Singh was India’s greatest military strategist: LG
content: Jammu, Dec 12: Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha on Friday paid tributes to General Zorawar Singh, saying that he was India’s greatest commander and military strategist.“General Zorawar Singh’s vision inspired generations by igniting passion, guiding people toward a shared vision, courage, purpose and commitment to bigger ideals,” LG Sinha said, addressing a commemorative event in Jammu.He spoke on General Zorawar Singh’s monumental military campaigns in Ladakh, Baltistan, Gilgit, and Skardu, and highlighted his pivotal role in the expansion of the Dogra empire.The LG called upon the youth and all sections of society to follow the message of General Zorawar Singh for moral clarity, unwavering conviction to shape a better future, and to empower the marginalised.“Let us dedicate ourselves to changing lives, guiding and supporting youth, and building a more just and peaceful society,” he said.LG Sinha reiterated that the Government of India, under the leadership of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, was committed to honouring the contributions of General Zorawar Singh.“To honour his legacy, the Government of India has named an advanced indigenous light tank after General Zorawar Singh Ji. The General Zorawar Singh Chair has also been established at the University of Jammu. Dedicated efforts are also being made to encourage new generations to study his unparalleled military campaigns and vision for societal organisation,” he said.Member of Legislative Assembly from Bahu, Vikram...

title: Mediterranean Trails Network Launches, Uniting Jordan, Palestine, Lebanon, and France to Promote Sustainable Hiking Tourism and Cultural Heritage Preservation
content: Mediterranean Trails Network Launches, Uniting Jordan, Palestine, Lebanon, and France to Promote Sustainable Hiking Tourism and Cultural Heritage PreservationThe Mediterranean Trails Network (MTN) officially launched today, marking a significant milestone in the world of hiking tourism. This new initiative, supported by the French Development Agency (AFD) and involving global organisations such as Oxfam and the World Bank, aims to promote hiking trails as key drivers of sustainable development and economic growth in the Mediterranean. The network brings together organisations from Jordan, Palestine, Lebanon, and France, marking the start of a comprehensive effort to protect cultural and natural heritage, promote local economic prosperity, and adapt to the challenges posed by climate change.Founding Partners and Key ContributorsThe Mediterranean Trails Network was founded by a group of trail-focused organizations, all of whom bring specific expertise in hiking and rural development. These include the Jordan Trail Association, the Palestine Heritage Trail, and the Lebanon Mountain Trail Association, all of which are instrumental in representing some of the most important hiking routes across the Mediterranean region. Additionally, French partners AFRAT and Tetraktys have been involved in the creation of the network, contributing their extensive knowledge and experience in rural development and trail management.The collaboration between these diverse stakeholders reflects a...
creator: poulomi sinha

title: Thai and Cambodian leaders have agreed to renew a ceasefire after days of deadly clashes, Trump says
content: By AAMER MADHANI WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump said Friday that Thai and Cambodian leaders have agreed to renew a truce after days of deadly clashes had threatened to undo a ceasefire the U.S. administration had helped broker earlier this year. Trump announced the agreement to restart the ceasefire in a social media posting following calls with Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul and Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet. “They have agreed to CEASE all shooting effective this evening, and go back to the original Peace Accord made with me, and them, with the help of the Great Prime Minister of Malaysia, Anwar Ibrahim,” Trump said in his Truth Social posting. Trump, a Republican, said that Ibrahim played an important role in helping him push Thailand and Cambodia to once again agree to stop fighting. “It is my Honor to work with Anutin and Hun in resolving what could have evolved into a major War between two otherwise wonderful and prosperous Countries!” Trump added. The original ceasefire in July was brokered by Malaysia and pushed through by pressure from Trump, who threatened to withhold trade privileges unless Thailand and Cambodia agreed. It was formalized in more detail in October at a regional meeting in Malaysia that Trump attended. Despite the deal, the two countries carried on a bitter propaganda war and minor cross-border violence continued. The roots of the Thai-Cambodian border conflict lie in a history of enmity over competing territorial claims....

title: Во тек е исплатата на правата од социјална и детска заштита
content: Министерството за социјална политика, демографија и млади информира дека денеска започна исплатата на правата од социјална, детска и цивилна заштита за месец ноември 2025 година. Корисниците на парични права коишто поседуваат дебитна картичка ќе можат да подигнат готовина на банкоматите на банките, да ги користат средствата за безготовински плаќања во продажната мрежа или преку електронско и мобилно банкарство од денеска, 12 декември 2025 година. Со цел да се избегне метеж пред и во банките при исплата на правата, за корисниците кои не користат картички, исплатата ќе се спроведе во 2 групи во сите отворени филијали и експозитури на банките, согласно со утврдениот распоред по азбучен ред, според првата буква од презимето и тоа: – 12.12.2025– А, Б, В, Г, Д, Ѓ, Е, Ж, З, Ѕ, И, Ј, К, Л, Љ – 15.12.2025– М, Н, Њ, О, П, Р С, Т, Ќ, У, Ф, Х, Ц, Ч, Џ, Ш.

title: Eltemették a Morrison's 2-ben halálra vert fiatalt
content: A fiatalembert pénteken kísérték utolsó útjára az újrónafői temetőben. A 25 éves Gábort november 29-én éjszaka olyan súlyosan bántalmazták a Morrison’s 2 szórakozóhelyen, hogy a helyszínen életét vesztette. Gábortól pénteken vettek végső búcsút szerettei, rokonai és barátai az újrónafői temetőben . A 25 éves mosonmagyaróvári fiatal november 29-én, a budapesti Morrison’s 2 szórakozóhelyen vesztette életét egy minden képzeletet felülmúlóan gyors és értelmetlen támadás következtében – számolt be az Origo. A végzetes éjszakán a barátaival szórakozó fiatalember szóváltásba keveredett egy 28 éves, kőművesként dolgozó férfival. A vita pillanatok alatt erőszakba fordult, a támadó két ütést mért Gábor fejére. Ennek következtében a fiatal nyakcsigolyáján futó egyik főverőér elszakadt, ezért bár a szórakozóhely egészségügyi dolgozói és a kiérkező mentők is mindent megtettek, Gábor perceken belül elhunyt. Szó sem lehetett önvédelemről a Morrison’s 2-ben A támadás után a rendőrség azonnal őrizetbe vette a gyanúsítottat, aki először azzal védekezett, hogy önvédelemből ütött. A nyomozás során azonban előkerült a biztonsági kamerák felvétele, amely alátámasztotta, hogy a történtek nem értékelhetők önvédelemként, így az ügy minősítése emberölésre változott. title: सदी का सबसे बड़ा सूर्यग्रहण देखने वाली है दुनिया! जानिए भारत में दिखाई देगा या नहीं?
content: Longest Solar Eclipse 2027: दुनिया सदी के सबसे बड़े सूर्यग्रहण को देखने वाली है। यह सूर्यग्रहण 6 मिनट 23 सेकंड का होगा। इसे 21वीं सदी के सबसे लंबे ग्रहणों में से एक माना जा रहा है। यह कई देशों में देखा जाएगा। जानिए भारत में यह ग्रहण दिखेगा या नहीं? Surya Grahan 2027: अगर आप अंतरिक्ष और खगोलीय घटनाओं के शौकीन हैं, तो 2 अगस्त 2027 की तारीख कैलेंडर में अभी से मार्क कर लीजिए। यह एक ऐतिहासिक दिन बनने वाला है। इस दिन होने वाला सूर्यग्रहण 21वीं सदी के सबसे लंबे सूर्यग्रहणों में से एक होगा। इसे 'इक्लिप्स ऑफ द सेंचुरी' (Eclipse of the Century) कहा जा रहा है। इस दिन चांद, सूरज और धरती बिल्कुल सीधी लाइन में आ जाएंगे और कुछ मिनटों के लिए दिन में ही अंधेरा छा जाएगा। आइए जानते हैं यह सूर्यग्रहण कहां-कहां दिखाई देगा और यह इतना खास क्यों है... 2027 का सूर्यग्रहण इतना बड़ा क्यों है? NASA और ग्लोबल एस्टोनॉमी डेटा के मुताबिक यह सूर्यग्रहण बेहद खास है, क्योंकि इसका टोटल फेज यानी पूरा अंधेरा 6 मिनट 23 सेकंड तक रहेगा। यह अवधि धरती से दिखने वाले सूर्यग्रहणों में सबसे लंबी में से एक है। यह दुर्लभ परफेक्ट-अलाइनमेंट के कारण बेहद शानदार दिखाई देगा। इस दौरान चांद और सूरज की पोजिशनिंग बिल्कुल परफेक्ट होगी, जिससे आसमान गहरा नीला या हल्का काला हो जाएगा। वैज्ञानिक इसे 21वीं सदी की सबसे लंबी और सबसे महत्वपूर्ण खगोलीय घटनाओं में गिन रहे हैं। मिस्र के लक्सर (Luxor) के पास यह ग्रहण सबसे ज्यादा देर तक दिखेगा। किन देशों में पूरा सूर्यग्रहण दिखाई देगा? इस सूर्यग्रहण की टोटैलिटी की पट्टी (Path of Totality) दक्षिण यूरोप, नॉर्थ अफ्रीका और मिडिल ईस्ट को कवर करेगी। इसमें स्पेन (Spain), मोरक्को (Morocco), अल्जीरिया,...

title: Los 10 estados de México con menos turismo extranjero en 2025
content: Aunque México es uno de los destinos turísticos más populares del mundo, con lugares emblemáticos como Cancún, Ciudad de México y Los Cabos liderando las llegadas de turistas internacionales, hay estados que aún no logran atraer la misma cantidad de visitantes del extranjero. En un análisis reciente sobre el flujo de turismo internacional en 2025, destacan 10 entidades federativas que, a pesar de su riqueza cultural y natural, registran cifras bajas en cuanto a turistas provenientes de otros países.1. Chihuahua: Entre el Desierto y la HistoriaChihuahua, conocido por su imponente Barranca del Cobre y su historia relacionada con la Revolución Mexicana, sigue siendo una de las entidades con menor afluencia de turistas internacionales. La falta de infraestructura aérea internacional y la ubicación geográfica en el norte del país contribuyen a que el estado no esté en el radar de los turistas extranjeros. Aunque la Ruta del Chepe atrae a viajeros nacionales, la falta de vuelos directos internacionales limita su crecimiento en este ámbito.2. Durango: El Corazón del Norte OlvidadoA pesar de su riqueza en paisajes montañosos y su fama como locación de muchas películas del género western, Durango continúa siendo un destino principalmente visitado por turistas nacionales. Las remotas localidades y la falta de un fuerte plan de promoción internacional hacen que el turismo extranjero en la región sea modesto.3. Coahuila: Entre el Desierto y la Historia...

title: Entire country proud of J&K Police: LG Sinha
content: Srinagar, Dec 12: Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha on Friday said the entire country was proud of the J&K Police for stopping terror in its tracks by unearthing and dismantling the terror network last month.Meeting the families of Nowgam Police Station blast victims in Srinagar and handing over appointment letters on compassionate grounds, LG Sinha appreciated J&K Police’s meticulous investigation and multi-faceted effort to detect, disrupt, and prevent terrorist acts.He also directed the senior officers to disrupt the terrorist financing pipeline and effectively counter the radicalisation attempts by certain separatist elements.The LG paid tribute to the victims of the blast and expressed gratitude to their families.He said the entire nation stands shoulder to shoulder with the families to ensure they live a life of comfort and dignity.Special DG Coordination PHQ, S J M Gillani; Principal Secretary Home, Chandraker Bharti; ADGP CID, Nitish Kumar; Principal Secretary to LG, Mandeep Kumar Bhandari; Divisional Commissioner Kashmir, Anshul Garg; IGP Kashmir, Vidhi Kumar Birdi; DIG CKR, Rajiv Pandey; SSP Srinagar, G V Sundeep Chakravarthy; Deputy Commissioner Srinagar, Akshay Labroo and senior officials of Police and civil administration were also present on the occasion. The post Entire country proud of J&K Police: LG Sinha appeared first on Greater Kashmir.

title: تعميم صورة مشتبه بها بجرم سرقة.. هل من يعرف عنها شيئًا؟
content: صدر عن المديرية العامة لقوى الامن الداخلي ـ شعبة العلاقات العامة البلاغ التالي: بتاريخ 11-12-2025، ادّعت مواطنة لدى فصيلة التل في وحدة الدرك الإقليمي، أنّها خلال وجودها داخل متجر لبيع الأدوات المنزلية في محلة التل، تعرّضت لسرقة محفظتها التي كانت تحتوي على جهاز خلوي، ومبلغ مالي، وأوراق ثبوتية. وبعد إجراء الاستقصاءات والتحريّات، تمكّنت الفصيلة من تحديد صورة المشتبه بها في عملية السرقة. لذلك وبناءً على إشارة القضاء المختص، تطلب المديرية العامة لقوى الأمن الداخلي من الذين يعرفون عنها شيئًا أو عن مكان تواجدها، الاتصال بالفصيلة المذكورة على الرقم: 06-448303، للإدلاء بما لديهم من معلومات، علمًا بأن كل من يُساهم في إعطاء أي معلومة يبقى اسمه طي الكتمان، وفقًا للقانون. تابع آخر الأخبار والمستجدات العاجلة مباشرة عبر قناتنا الإخبارية على واتساب. كن أول من يعرف الأحداث المهمة.
